Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(******************************************************************************************

 The associators for composition of enriched profunctors

 In this file, we define the associators for composition of enriched profunctors. All the
 constructions and proofs boil down to calculations with coends. To construct the desired
 morphisms, we use the mapping property and to prove the necessary laws, we use the
 uniqueness of such morphisms.

 Content
 1. The right associator
 1.1. Action on objects
 1.2. The data
 1.3. The laws
 1.4. The right associator as a transformation
 2. The left associator
 2.1. Action on objects
 2.2. The data

 ******************************************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Prelude.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Coends.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.OppositeCategory.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PrecategoryBinProduct.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.BenabouCosmos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Enrichment.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.EnrichmentFunctor.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.Profunctor.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.StandardProfunctors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.ProfunctorTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.Invertible.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.ProfunctorSquares.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.Composition.CompositionProf.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Structure.Symmetric.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Structure.Closed.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope moncat.

Import MonoidalNotations.

Opaque sym_mon_braiding.

Section Associator.
  Context {V : benabou_cosmos}
          {C₁ C₂ C₃ C₄ : category}
          {E₁ : enrichment C₁ V}
          {E₂ : enrichment C₂ V}
          {E₃ : enrichment C₃ V}
          {E₄ : enrichment C₄ V}
          (P₁ : E₁ ↛e E₂)
          (P₂ : E₂ ↛e E₃)
          (P₃ : E₃ ↛e E₄).

  (** * 1. The right associator *)

  (** ** 1.1. Action on objects *)
  Definition lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob
             (z : C₄)
             (y : C₃)
             (x : C₂)
             (w : C₁)
    : P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z y ⊗ P₁ x w
      -->
      comp_enriched_profunctor (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w
    := sym_mon_braiding _ _ _
       · mon_rassociator _ _ _
       · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x #⊗ identity _)
       · comp_enriched_profunctor_in (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w y.

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· internal_lam
    (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y₁ x w) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· identity (P₂ y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
· internal_lam
    (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y₂ x w)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· internal_lam
    (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y₁ x w) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· identity (P₂ y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
· internal_lam
    (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y₂ x w)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧),
(lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
 · internal_lam
     (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y₁ x w))
#⊗ h
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w) =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
 #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
 · mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
 · identity (P₂ y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
 · internal_lam
     (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y₂ x w))
#⊗ h
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
(lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
 · internal_lam
     (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y₁ x w))
#⊗ h
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w) =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
 #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
 · mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
 · identity (P₂ y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
 · internal_lam
     (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y₂ x w))
#⊗ h
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
(lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)) #⊗ h
· internal_lam
    (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y₁ x w)
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w) =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
 #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)) #⊗ h
· mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· (identity (P₂ y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂)
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· internal_lam
    (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y₂ x w)
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
(lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)) #⊗ h
· (internal_lam
     (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y₁ x w)
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
   · internal_eval (P₁ x w)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w)) =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
 #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
   · ((identity (P₂ y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂)
      #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
      · (internal_lam
           (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z
              y₂ x w) #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
         · internal_eval (P₁ x w)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z
                w))))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
(lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)) #⊗ h
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y₁ x w =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
 #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
   · ((identity (P₂ y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂)
      #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
      · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y₂ x
          w))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y₂ x ⊗ P₃ z y₁) #⊗ h
· (lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y₁ x w =
identity ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y₂ x ⊗ P₃ z y₁) #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)) #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· (mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
   · ((identity (P₂ y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂)
      #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
      · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y₂ x
          w))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y₂ x ⊗ P₃ z y₁) #⊗ h
· ((lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y₁ x w) =
identity ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y₂ x ⊗ P₃ z y₁) #⊗ h
· ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
    #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)) #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
   · (mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        (P₃ z y₁) #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
      · ((identity (P₂ y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂)
         #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
         · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y₂
             x w)))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
(lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))
#⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y₁ x w =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
 #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)) #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· (mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
   · ((identity (P₂ y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂)
      #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
      · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y₂ x
          w))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
(lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))
#⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₁ x ⊗ P₃ z y₁) (P₁ x w)
   · mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₁ x) (P₃ z y₁)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₁ w x
     #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w y₁) =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
 #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)) #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· (mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
   · ((identity (P₂ y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂)
      #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x ⊗ P₃ z y₂)
           (P₁ x w)
         · mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x)
             (P₃ z y₂)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x
           #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w
             y₂)))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
(lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))
#⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₁ x ⊗ P₃ z y₁) (P₁ x w)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₁ x) (P₃ z y₁)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₁ w x
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w y₁ =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
 #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)) #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· (identity (P₂ y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂)
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x ⊗ P₃ z y₂) (P₁ x w)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x) (P₃ z y₂)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w y₂

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V
  ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y₂ x ⊗ P₃ z y₁) (P₁ x w)
· identity (P₁ x w)
  #⊗ (lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₁ x) (P₃ z y₁)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₁ w x
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w y₁ =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
 #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)) #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· (identity (P₂ y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂)
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x ⊗ P₃ z y₂) (P₁ x w)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x) (P₃ z y₂)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w y₂

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V
  ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y₂ x ⊗ P₃ z y₁) (P₁ x w)
· (identity (P₁ x w)
   #⊗ (lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))
   · (mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₁ x) (P₃ z y₁)
      · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₁ w x
         #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w
             y₁))) =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
 #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)) #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· (mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
   · ((identity (P₂ y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂)
      #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x ⊗ P₃ z y₂)
           (P₁ x w)
         · (mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x)
              (P₃ z y₂)
            · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w
                 x #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
               · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                   z w y₂)))))

             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w
             y₁))) = ?b

  ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y₂ x ⊗ P₃ z y₁) (P₁ x w)
· identity (P₁ x w)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
      #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
      · mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
          (P₃ z y₁)
      · identity (P₂ y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂) = 
?y'

      apply idpath.
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V
  ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y₂ x ⊗ P₃ z y₁) (P₁ x w)
· identity (P₁ x w)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
      #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
      · mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
          (P₃ z y₁)
      · identity (P₂ y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x) (P₃ z y₂)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w y₂ =
sym_mon_braiding V
  ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y₂ x ⊗ P₃ z y₁) (P₁ x w)
· (mon_rassociator (P₁ x w)
     ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y₂ x) (P₃ z y₁)
   · ((identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x)
      #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
      · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₁ w x
         #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w
             y₁)))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V
  ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y₂ x ⊗ P₃ z y₁) (P₁ x w)
· (identity (P₁ x w)
   #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
       #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
       · (mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            (P₃ z y₁)
          · identity (P₂ y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂))
   · (mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x) (P₃ z y₂)
      · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x
         #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w
             y₂))) =
sym_mon_braiding V
  ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y₂ x ⊗ P₃ z y₁) (P₁ x w)
· (mon_rassociator (P₁ x w)
     ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y₂ x) (P₃ z y₁)
   · ((identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x)
      #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
      · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₁ w x
         #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w
             y₁)))

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
    #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
    · (mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         (P₃ z y₁)
       · identity (P₂ y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂))
· (mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x) (P₃ z y₂)
   · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x
      #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w y₂)) =
mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
  (P₃ z y₁)
· ((identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x)
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
   · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₁ w x
      #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w y₁))

      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in

#⊗ (identity (P₂ y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂)
· (mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x) (P₃ z y₂)

identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ (identity (P₂ y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x) (P₃ z y₂)

  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)

  ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ identity (P₂ y₂ x))
  #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂

  ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
· ((identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ identity (P₂ y₂ x))
   #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
   · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x

      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in

a: V

identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
    #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))
· (identity (P₁ x w)
   #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        (P₃ z y₁)
   · (mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x)
        ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
      · ((identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ identity (P₂ y₂ x))
         #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
         · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x
            #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
            · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z
                w y₂)))) =
mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
  (P₃ z y₁)
· ((identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x)
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
   · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₁ w x
      #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)

            · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z
                w y₂)))) = ?b

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
(identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ identity (P₂ y₂ x))
#⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w y₂) =
?t2

#⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)

· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in

z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x
#⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
· identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
  #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w y₂ = ?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x
#⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
   #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w y₂) =
?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
#⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w y₂ = ?t2

      apply (comp_enriched_profunctor_comm' (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃).
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
    #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))
· (identity (P₁ x w)
   #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        (P₃ z y₁)
   · (mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x)
        ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
      · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x
         #⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
         · (identity
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
            #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                 (P₃ z y₁)
            · mon_rassociator
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
                (P₃ z y₁) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            · sym_mon_braiding V
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w
                 ⊗ P₃ z y₁) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            · mon_rassociator (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
                (P₃ z y₁)
            · lmap_e (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                y₂ y₁ w #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
            · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z
                w y₁)))) =
mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
  (P₃ z y₁)
· ((identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x)
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
   · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₁ w x
      #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w y₁))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
    #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))
· identity (P₁ x w)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x)
    ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x
  #⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
· identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_rassociator
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w) (P₃ z y₁)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w) (P₃ z y₁)
· lmap_e (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) y₂ y₁ w
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w y₁ =
mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
  (P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₁ w x
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w y₁

    
V: benabou_cosmos

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
    #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))
· identity (P₁ x w)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x)
    ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x
  #⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
· identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_rassociator
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w) (P₃ z y₁)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w) (P₃ z y₁)
· lmap_e (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) y₂ y₁ w
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁) =
mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
  (P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₁ w x
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)

    
V: benabou_cosmos

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
    #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))
· identity (P₁ x w)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x)
    ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x
  #⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
· identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_rassociator
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w) (P₃ z y₁)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w) (P₃ z y₁)
· lmap_e (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) y₂ y₁ w
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
?b =
mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
  (P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₁ w x
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)

identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
    #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))
· identity (P₁ x w)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x)
    ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x
  #⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
· identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_rassociator
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w) (P₃ z y₁)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w) (P₃ z y₁)
· lmap_e (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) y₂ y₁ w

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
    #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))
· (identity (P₁ x w)
   #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        (P₃ z y₁)
   · (mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x)
        ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
      · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x
         #⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
         · (identity
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
            #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                 (P₃ z y₁)
            · (mon_rassociator
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
                 (P₃ z y₁) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
               · (sym_mon_braiding V
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂
                       w ⊗ P₃ z y₁) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                  · (mon_rassociator (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂
                          y₂ w) (P₃ z y₁)
                     · lmap_e
                         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                            P₂) y₂ y₁ w
                       #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)))))))) =
?b

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x
#⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
   · (mon_rassociator
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
        (P₃ z y₁) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w
            ⊗ P₃ z y₁) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         · (mon_rassociator (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
              (P₃ z y₁)
            · lmap_e (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                y₂ y₁ w #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))))) =
?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x
#⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
· identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_rassociator
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w) (P₃ z y₁)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w) (P₃ z y₁)
· lmap_e (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) y₂ y₁ w
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁) = ?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄

x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_rassociator
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w) (P₃ z y₁)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w) (P₃ z y₁)
· lmap_e (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) y₂ y₁ w
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁) = ?t2

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁ ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
· mon_rassociator
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w) (P₃ z y₁)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w) (P₃ z y₁)
· lmap_e (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) y₂ y₁ w
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁) = ?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁ ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
   · (mon_rassociator
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
        (P₃ z y₁) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w
            ⊗ P₃ z y₁) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         · (mon_rassociator (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
              (P₃ z y₁)
            · lmap_e (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                y₂ y₁ w #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))))) =
?t2

 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x
 · lmap_e (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) y₂ y₁ w)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁) = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
    #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))
· (identity (P₁ x w)
   #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        (P₃ z y₁)
   · (mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x)
        ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
      · (identity (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
         #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
              (P₃ z y₁)
         · (mon_rassociator (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
              (P₃ z y₁) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            · (sym_mon_braiding V
                 (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
                 (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
               · (mon_rassociator (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                    (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x) (P₃ z y₁)
                  · (identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                     #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
                          P₂ y₂ w x
                     · lmap_e
                         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                            P₂) y₂ y₁ w)
                    #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))))))) =
mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
  (P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₁ w x
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
    #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))
· identity (P₁ x w)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x)
    ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
· identity (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x) (P₃ z y₁)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
    (P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x
   · lmap_e (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) y₂ y₁ w)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁) =
mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
  (P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₁ w x
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
    #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))
· identity (P₁ x w)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x)
    ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
· identity (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x) (P₃ z y₁)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
    (P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x
   · lmap_e (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) y₂ y₁ w)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
?b =
mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
  (P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₁ w x
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
    #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))
· identity (P₁ x w)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x)
    ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
· identity (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x) (P₃ z y₁)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
    (P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x
   · lmap_e (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) y₂ y₁ w)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁) = ?b

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
    #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))
· identity (P₁ x w)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x)
    ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
· identity (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x) (P₃ z y₁)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
    (P₃ z y₁) = ?y'

#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
    #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))
· identity (P₁ x w)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x)

a: V

identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
    #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))
· (identity (P₁ x w)
   #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)

              (P₃ z y₁) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)

                 (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
                 (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
               · mon_rassociator (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                   (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x) (P₃ z y₁)))))) =
?b

a: V

mon_rassociator (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x) (P₃ z y₁)
  (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
     (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · mon_rassociator (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x) (P₃ z y₁)) = ?t2

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
mon_rassociator (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x) (P₃ z y₁)
  (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
    (P₃ z y₁) = ?t2

        apply sym_mon_hexagon_rassociator.

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
    #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))
· (identity (P₁ x w)
   #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        (P₃ z y₁)
   · (mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x)
        ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
      · (identity (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
         #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
              (P₃ z y₁)
         · (identity (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
            #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z y₁)
                 (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            · mon_rassociator (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
                (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
            · sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
                (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))))) =
?y'

    #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))

   #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        (P₃ z y₁)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
?b = ?y'

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
    #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))
· (identity (P₁ x w)
   #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        (P₃ z y₁)
   · (mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x)
        ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
      · (identity (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
         #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
              (P₃ z y₁)
         · (identity (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
            #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z y₁)
                 (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            · mon_rassociator (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
                (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
            · sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
                (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))))) =
?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z y₁) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · mon_rassociator (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
       (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
       (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· identity (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z y₁) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P₃ z y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
    · sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z y₁) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P₃ z y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
#⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P₃ z y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity
  (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁))
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P₃ z y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
mon_rassociator (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P₃ z y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁) = ?t2

        apply idpath.

#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
    #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))
· (identity (P₁ x w)
   #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)

   · (mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x)

         · sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
             (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)))) =
?y'

z: C₄

x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
    #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))
· (identity (P₁ x w)
   #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        (P₃ z y₁)
   · (mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x)
        ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
      · (mon_rassociator (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
           (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x)
  ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
· (mon_rassociator (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P₃ z y₁)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
       (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)) = ?t2

x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x)
  ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P₃ z y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁) = ?t2

identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ mon_rassociator (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
    (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁) = ?t2

        apply idpath.

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
    #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))
· (identity (P₁ x w)
   #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        (P₃ z y₁)
   · (identity (P₁ x w)
      #⊗ mon_rassociator (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           (P₃ z y₁)
      · mon_rassociator (P₁ x w)
          (P₂ y₂ x ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)) (P₃ z y₁)
      · mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x)
          (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
      · sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
          (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))) =
?y'

   · mon_rassociator (P₁ x w)

· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)

#⊗ identity (P₂ y₂ x ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
    (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁) = ?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity
  (P₁ x w ⊗ (P₂ y₂ x ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁))
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
    (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁) = ?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
  (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁) = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
    #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))
· (mon_rassociator (P₁ x w)
     (P₂ y₂ x ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)) (P₃ z y₁)
   · mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x)
       (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
       (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))
· (identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x
   · lmap_e (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) y₂ y₁ w)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁) =
mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
  (P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₁ w x
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)

x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
    #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
    (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x
   · lmap_e (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) y₂ y₁ w)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁) =
mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
  (P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)

E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
  (P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (P₁ x w)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x
   · lmap_e (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) y₂ y₁ w)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁) =
mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
  (P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)

  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
  (P₃ z y₁)
· ((identity (P₁ x w)
    #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x))
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
   · (mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x)
        (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
           (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
         · (identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w
                 x
            · lmap_e (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                y₂ y₁ w) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)))) =
mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
  (P₃ z y₁)
· ((identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x)
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₁ w x
     #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
(identity (P₁ x w)
 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x))
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· (mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
        (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
      · (identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x
         · lmap_e (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) y₂
             y₁ w) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))) =
(identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₁ w x
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
(identity (P₁ x w)
 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
 · (mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
         (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       · (identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
          #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x
          · lmap_e (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) y₂
              y₁ w)))) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁) =
(identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₁ w x)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
· (mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
        (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · (identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x
         · lmap_e (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) y₂
             y₁ w))) =
identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₁ w x

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
· (mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
        (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · (identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x
         · lmap_e (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) y₂
             y₁ w))) =
identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₁ w x

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
· (mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
        (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · (identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x
         · (identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁ P₂ y₂
                 y₁ w
            · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                 ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂
                     y₁ w)
            · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁
                   w))))) =
identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₁ w x

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
· (mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
        (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · (identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x
         · (identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁ P₂ y₂
                 y₁ w
            · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                 ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂
                     y₁ w)
            · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁
                   w))))) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
?b =
identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₁ w x

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
· (mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
        (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · (identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x
         · (identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁ P₂ y₂
                 y₁ w
            · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                 ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂
                     y₁ w)
            · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁
                   w))))) = ?b

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x
· (identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁ P₂ y₂ y₁ w
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w)
   · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w)) = 
?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x
· identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁ P₂ y₂ y₁ w
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w) = ?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁ P₂ y₂ y₁ w)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w) = ?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁ P₂ y₂ y₁ w)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w) = ?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
· ((comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁ P₂ y₂ y₁ w)
   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w)) = 
?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
     (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor P₁ P₂ y₂ y₁ w x) =
?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor P₁ P₂ y₂ y₁ w x =
?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor P₁ P₂ y₂ y₁ w x =
?t2

      apply id_left.
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
· (mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
        (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor P₁ P₂ y₂ y₁
          w x)) =
identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₁ w x

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
· (mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
        (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
         · mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x)
             (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         · identity (P₁ x w)
           #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x)
                 (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) · lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₁ w x))) =
identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₁ w x

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x w)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₁ w x =
identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₁ w x

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x w)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x) =
identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x w)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V

x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
?b = identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x

#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)

  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x) = ?y'

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
· (mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
        (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
          (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x))) = ?y'

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
· (mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · identity (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))) =
?y'

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) =
?y'

      apply idpath.
    
V: benabou_cosmos

identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x w)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x) =

· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)

  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x) = ?b
