V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x w)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x) = ?b

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) =
?y'

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
· (mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y₂ x)
       (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)) = ?y'

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
· identity (P₁ x w ⊗ (P₂ y₂ x ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))) =
?y'

      apply id_right.
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
· identity (P₁ x w)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x) =
identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
    · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       · lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x)) =
identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
    · sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    · lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x) =
identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ (identity ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y₂ x)
    · lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x) =
identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x =
identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  (** ** 1.2. The data *)
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x: C₂
w: C₁
V ⟦ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x,
P₁ x w
⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w ⟧

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x: C₂
w: C₁
V ⟦ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x,
P₁ x w
⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w ⟧

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x: C₂
w: C₁
∏ y : C₃,
V ⟦ P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z y,
P₁ x w
⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w ⟧
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x: C₂
w: C₁
∏ y₁ y₂ : C₃,
lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁) · ?fs y₁ =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· identity (P₂ y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂ · ?fs y₂

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x: C₂
w: C₁
∏ y : C₃,
V ⟦ P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z y,
P₁ x w
⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w ⟧
 exact (λ y, internal_lam (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y x w)).
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x: C₂
w: C₁
∏ y₁ y₂ : C₃,
lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· (λ y : C₃,
   internal_lam
     (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y x w))
    y₁ =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· identity (P₂ y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
· (λ y : C₃,
   internal_lam
     (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y x w))
    y₂
 
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x: C₂
w: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₃
lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· internal_lam
    (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y₁ x w) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· identity (P₂ y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
· internal_lam
    (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y₂ x w)

      exact (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_eq z y₁ y₂ x w).
  Defined.

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x y
 · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x w)
#⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w) =
lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y x w

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x y
 · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x w)
#⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w) =
lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y x w

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x y
 · from_comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x
     (λ y : C₃,
      internal_lam
        (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y x
           w))
     (λ y₁ y₂ : C₃,
      lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_eq z y₁ y₂ x
        w)) #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w) =
lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y x w

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
internal_lam
  (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y x w)
#⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w) =
lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y x w

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y x w =
lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y x w

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w
#⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₁ w)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x₁ w
     #⊗ identity (P₁ x₁ w)
   · internal_eval (P₁ x₁ w)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
#⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
· identity (P₁ x₂ w)
  #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P₂ P₃ z x₁ x₂
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
          ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₂)
      · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₂))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₂)
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x₂ w
     #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
   · internal_eval (P₁ x₂ w)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w
#⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₁ w)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x₁ w
     #⊗ identity (P₁ x₁ w)
   · internal_eval (P₁ x₁ w)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
#⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
· identity (P₁ x₂ w)
  #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P₂ P₃ z x₁ x₂
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
          ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₂)
      · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₂))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₂)
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x₂ w
     #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
   · internal_eval (P₁ x₂ w)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
internal_transpose
  (lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w
   #⊗ identity
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₁ w)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
      · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x₁ w
        #⊗ identity (P₁ x₁ w)
      · internal_eval (P₁ x₁ w)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w))) =
internal_transpose
  (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
   #⊗ identity
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
   · mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
   · identity (P₁ x₂ w)
     #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P₂ P₃ z x₁
              x₂
         · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
             ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
              ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₂)
         · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₂))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₂)
      · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x₂ w
        #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
      · internal_eval (P₁ x₂ w)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w)))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
∏ y : C₃,
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₁ y
· internal_transpose
    (lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w
     #⊗ identity
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
     · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₁ w)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
        · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x₁ w
          #⊗ identity (P₁ x₁ w)
        · internal_eval (P₁ x₁ w)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w))) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₁ y
· internal_transpose
    (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
     #⊗ identity
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
     · mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
     · identity (P₁ x₂ w)
       #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P₂ P₃ z x₁
                x₂
           · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z
                    x₂)
           · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₂))
     · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₂)
        · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x₂ w
          #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
        · internal_eval (P₁ x₂ w)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w)))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₁ x'
· internal_transpose
    (lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w
     #⊗ identity
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
     · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₁ w)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
        · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x₁ w
          #⊗ identity (P₁ x₁ w)
        · internal_eval (P₁ x₁ w)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w))) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₁ x'
· internal_transpose
    (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
     #⊗ identity
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
     · mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
     · identity (P₁ x₂ w)
       #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P₂ P₃ z x₁
                x₂
           · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z
                    x₂)
           · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₂))
     · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₂)
        · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x₂ w
          #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
        · internal_eval (P₁ x₂ w)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w)))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⟧),
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₁ x'
 · internal_transpose
     (lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w
      #⊗ identity
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₁ w)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
         · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x₁ w
           #⊗ identity (P₁ x₁ w)
         · internal_eval (P₁ x₁ w)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z
                w)))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w) =
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₁ x'
 · internal_transpose
     (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
      #⊗ identity
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
      · mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
      · identity (P₁ x₂ w)
        #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P₂ P₃ z
                 x₁ x₂
            · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                 ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z
                     x₂)
            · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z
                   x₂))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₂)
         · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x₂ w
           #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
         · internal_eval (P₁ x₂ w)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z
                w)))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w)

 · internal_transpose

                     x₂)

         · internal_eval (P₁ x₂ w)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category

x': C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₁ x' #⊗ h
· internal_transpose
    (lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w
     #⊗ identity
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
     · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₁ w)

        · internal_eval (P₁ x₁ w)

               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w)))
  #⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
· internal_eval ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₁ x' #⊗ h
· internal_transpose
    (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
     #⊗ identity
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
     · mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
     · identity (P₁ x₂ w)
       #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)

               ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z
                    x₂)
           · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₂))
     · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₂)
        · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x₂ w
          #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
        · internal_eval (P₁ x₂ w)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w)))
  #⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
· internal_eval ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⟧
identity (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x') #⊗ h
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₁ x'
  #⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
· internal_transpose
    (lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w
     #⊗ identity
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
     · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₁ w)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
        · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x₁ w
          #⊗ identity (P₁ x₁ w)
        · internal_eval (P₁ x₁ w)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w)))
  #⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
· internal_eval ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w) =
identity (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x') #⊗ h
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₁ x'
  #⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
· internal_transpose
    (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
     #⊗ identity
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
     · mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
     · identity (P₁ x₂ w)
       #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P₂ P₃ z x₁
                x₂
           · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z
                    x₂)
           · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₂))
     · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₂)
        · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x₂ w
          #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
        · internal_eval (P₁ x₂ w)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w)))
  #⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
· internal_eval ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⟧
identity (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x') #⊗ h
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₁ x'
   #⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
   · (internal_transpose
        (lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w
         #⊗ identity
              (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₁ w)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
            · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z
                 x₁ w #⊗ identity (P₁ x₁ w)
               · internal_eval (P₁ x₁ w)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                      P₃ z w))))
      #⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
      · internal_eval ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w))) =
identity (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x') #⊗ h
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₁ x'
   #⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
   · (internal_transpose
        (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
         #⊗ identity
              (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
         · (mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
            · (identity (P₁ x₂ w)
               #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P₂
                        P₃ z x₁ x₂
                   · (sym_mon_braiding V
                        (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                        ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                         ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                             P₂ P₃ z x₂)
                      · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                             P₂ P₃ z x₂)))
               · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃
                       z x₂)
                  · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor
                       z x₂ w #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
                     · internal_eval (P₁ x₂ w)
                         (comp_enriched_profunctor
                            (comp_enriched_profunctor
                               P₁ P₂) P₃ z w))))))
      #⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
      · internal_eval ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w)))

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

w: C₁
x': C₃

h: V ⟦ a, (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₁ x'
#⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
· (internal_transpose
     (lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w
      #⊗ identity
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₁ w)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
         · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x₁ w
            #⊗ identity (P₁ x₁ w)
            · internal_eval (P₁ x₁ w)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                   z w))))
   #⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
   · internal_eval ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w)) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₁ x'
#⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
· (internal_transpose
     (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
      #⊗ identity
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
      · (mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
         · (identity (P₁ x₂ w)
            #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P₂ P₃
                     z x₁ x₂
                · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                     ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                      ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂
                          P₃ z x₂)
                   · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂
                          P₃ z x₂)))
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w)
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z
                    x₂)
               · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor
                    z x₂ w #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
                  · internal_eval (P₁ x₂ w)
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor
                         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                            P₂) P₃ z w))))))
   #⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
   · internal_eval ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₁ x'
#⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
        ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
      · (lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w
         #⊗ identity
              (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₁ w)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
            · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z
                 x₁ w #⊗ identity (P₁ x₁ w)
               · internal_eval (P₁ x₁ w)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                      P₃ z w)))))
   #⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
   · internal_eval ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w)) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₁ x'
#⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
        ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
         #⊗ identity
              (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
         · (mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
            · (identity (P₁ x₂ w)
               #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P₂
                        P₃ z x₁ x₂
                   · (sym_mon_braiding V
                        (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                        ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                         ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                             P₂ P₃ z x₂)
                      · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                             P₂ P₃ z x₂)))
               · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃
                       z x₂)
                  · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor
                       z x₂ w #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
                     · internal_eval (P₁ x₂ w)
                         (comp_enriched_profunctor
                            (comp_enriched_profunctor
                               P₁ P₂) P₃ z w)))))))
   #⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
   · internal_eval ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₁ x'
#⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
     ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
   · (lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w
      #⊗ identity
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₁ w)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
         · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x₁ w
            #⊗ identity (P₁ x₁ w)
            · internal_eval (P₁ x₁ w)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                   z w))))) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₁ x'
#⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
     ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
      #⊗ identity
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
      · (mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
         · (identity (P₁ x₂ w)
            #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P₂ P₃
                     z x₁ x₂
                · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                     ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                      ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂
                          P₃ z x₂)
                   · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂
                          P₃ z x₂)))
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w)
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z
                    x₂)
               · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor
                    z x₂ w #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
                  · internal_eval (P₁ x₂ w)
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor
                         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                            P₂) P₃ z w)))))))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₁ x'
#⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
· lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w
  #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₁ w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x₁ w
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x₁ w)
· internal_eval (P₁ x₁ w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₁ x'
#⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
  #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
· identity (P₁ x₂ w)
  #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P₂ P₃ z x₁ x₂
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
          ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₂)
      · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₂))
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₂)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x₂ w
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
· internal_eval (P₁ x₂ w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
  ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
· identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₁ x'
· lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w
  #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₁ w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x₁ w
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x₁ w)
· internal_eval (P₁ x₁ w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
  ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
· identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₁ x'
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
  #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
· identity (P₁ x₂ w)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P₂ P₃ z x₁ x₂
        #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₂))
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₂)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x₂ w
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
· internal_eval (P₁ x₂ w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
  ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
· (identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₁ x'
   · (lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w
      #⊗ identity
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₁ w)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
         · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x₁ w
            #⊗ identity (P₁ x₁ w)
            · internal_eval (P₁ x₁ w)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                   z w))))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
  ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
· (identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₁ x'
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
      #⊗ identity
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
      · (mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
         · (identity (P₁ x₂ w)
            #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                  (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z
                     x₁)
                · (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P₂ P₃
                     z x₁ x₂
                   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                   · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂
                          P₃ z x₂)))
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w)
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z
                    x₂)
               · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor
                    z x₂ w #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
                  · internal_eval (P₁ x₂ w)
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor
                         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                            P₂) P₃ z w)))))))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⟧
identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₁ x'
· (lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w
   #⊗ identity
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₁ w)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
      · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x₁ w
         #⊗ identity (P₁ x₁ w)
         · internal_eval (P₁ x₁ w)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z
                w)))) =
identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₁ x'
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
   #⊗ identity
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
   · (mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
      · (identity (P₁ x₂ w)
         #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
             · (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P₂ P₃ z
                  x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃
                       z x₂)))
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₂)
            · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z
                 x₂ w #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
               · internal_eval (P₁ x₂ w)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                      P₃ z w))))))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⟧
identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₁ x'
· (lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w
   #⊗ identity
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₁ w)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
      · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x₁ w
         #⊗ identity (P₁ x₁ w)
         · internal_eval (P₁ x₁ w)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z
                w)))) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⟧
?b =
identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₁ x'
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
   #⊗ identity
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
   · (mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
      · (identity (P₁ x₂ w)
         #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
             · (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P₂ P₃ z
                  x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃
                       z x₂)))
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₂)
            · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z
                 x₂ w #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
               · internal_eval (P₁ x₂ w)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                      P₃ z w))))))

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

· (lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w
   #⊗ identity
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)

         · internal_eval (P₁ x₁ w)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z
                w)))) = ?b

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

w: C₁
x': C₃
a: V

(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₁ x'
 · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x₁ w)
#⊗ identity (P₁ x₁ w)
· internal_eval (P₁ x₁ w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w) = 
?t2

      apply lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_comm.
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
  (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
· (identity (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x') #⊗ lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z x' x₁ w) =
identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₁ x'
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
   #⊗ identity
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
   · (mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
      · (identity (P₁ x₂ w)
         #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
             · (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P₂ P₃ z
                  x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃
                       z x₂)))
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₂)
            · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z
                 x₂ w #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
               · internal_eval (P₁ x₂ w)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                      P₃ z w))))))

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⟧
identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₁ x'
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
   #⊗ identity
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
   · (mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
      · (identity (P₁ x₂ w)
         #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
             · (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P₂ P₃ z
                  x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃
                       z x₂)))
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₂)
            · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z
                 x₂ w #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
               · internal_eval (P₁ x₂ w)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                      P₃ z w)))))) =
sym_mon_braiding V ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
  (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
· (identity (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x') #⊗ lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z x' x₁ w)

identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₁ x'
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
   #⊗ identity
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
   · (mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
      · (identity (P₁ x₂ w)
         #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
             · (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P₂ P₃ z
                  x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃
                       z x₂)))
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₂)
            · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z
                 x₂ w #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
               · internal_eval (P₁ x₂ w)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                      P₃ z w)))))) = ?b

#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₁ x'
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
  #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)

· identity (P₁ x₂ w)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)

      · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P₂ P₃ z x₁ x₂
        #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₂))
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₂)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x₂ w
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
· internal_eval (P₁ x₂ w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w) =

           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₂)))

    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₂)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x₂ w
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
· internal_eval (P₁ x₂ w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w) = 
?t2

#⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₁ x'
    · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P₂ P₃ z x₁ x₂
      #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₂))
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₂)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x₂ w
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
· internal_eval (P₁ x₂ w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w) = 
?t2

(sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
   (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor P₂ P₃ z x₁ x₂ x')
#⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w) = ?y'

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
   (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor P₂ P₃ z x₁ x₂ x')
#⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x₂ w
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
· internal_eval (P₁ x₂ w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w) = 
?t2

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V

P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
  (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ x' x₁)
     (P₃ z x') #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
   · ((rmap_e P₂ x' x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (P₃ z x'))

         #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
         · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x₂ w
            #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
            · internal_eval (P₁ x₂ w)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                   z w))))) = ?t2

w: C₁
x': C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₂ x'
#⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x₂ w
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)

x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⟧
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₂ x'
 · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x₂ w)

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⟧
lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z x' x₂ w = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
#⊗ identity (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
· (mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w)
        ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x'))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x') #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
              (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
            · (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                 (P₂ x' x₁) (P₃ z x')
               #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
               · ((rmap_e P₂ x' x₁ x₂
                   #⊗ identity (P₃ z x'))
                  #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
                  · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob
                      z x' x₂ w)))))) =
sym_mon_braiding V ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
  (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
· (identity (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x') #⊗ lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z x' x₁ w)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
#⊗ identity (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
· (mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w)
        ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x'))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x') #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
              (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
            · (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                 (P₂ x' x₁) (P₃ z x')
               #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
               · ((rmap_e P₂ x' x₁ x₂
                   #⊗ identity (P₃ z x'))
                  #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
                  · (sym_mon_braiding V
                       (P₂ x' x₂ ⊗ P₃ z x') (P₁ x₂ w)
                     · mon_rassociator (P₁ x₂ w)
                         (P₂ x' x₂) (P₃ z x')
                     · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
                         P₂ x' w x₂
                       #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')
                     · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
                         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                            P₂) P₃ z w x'))))))) =
sym_mon_braiding V ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
  (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
· (identity (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x') #⊗ lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
        (P₁ x₁ w)
      · mon_rassociator (P₁ x₁ w) (P₂ x' x₁) (P₃ z x')
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x' w x₁
        #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w x'))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
#⊗ identity (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x'))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x') #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
    (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ x' x₁) (P₃ z x')
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
· (rmap_e P₂ x' x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (P₃ z x'))
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x' x₂ ⊗ P₃ z x') (P₁ x₂ w)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ x' x₂) (P₃ z x')
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x' w x₂
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w x' =
sym_mon_braiding V ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
  (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
· identity (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x') #⊗ lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x') (P₁ x₁ w)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x₁ w) (P₂ x' x₁) (P₃ z x')
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x' w x₁
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w x'

    
V: benabou_cosmos

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄

x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
#⊗ identity (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x'))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x') #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
    (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ x' x₁) (P₃ z x')
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
· (rmap_e P₂ x' x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (P₃ z x'))
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x' x₂ ⊗ P₃ z x') (P₁ x₂ w)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ x' x₂) (P₃ z x')
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x' w x₂
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x') =
sym_mon_braiding V ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
  (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
· identity (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x') #⊗ lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x') (P₁ x₁ w)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x₁ w) (P₂ x' x₁) (P₃ z x')
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x' w x₁
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')

#⊗ identity (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x'))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x') #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
    (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ x' x₁) (P₃ z x')
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
· (rmap_e P₂ x' x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (P₃ z x'))
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x' x₂ ⊗ P₃ z x') (P₁ x₂ w)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ x' x₂) (P₃ z x')
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x' w x₂
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x') = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⟧
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
  (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
· identity (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x') #⊗ lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x') (P₁ x₁ w)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x₁ w) (P₂ x' x₁) (P₃ z x')
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x' w x₁
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
#⊗ identity (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x'))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x') #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
    (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ x' x₁) (P₃ z x')
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
· (rmap_e P₂ x' x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (P₃ z x'))
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x' x₂ ⊗ P₃ z x') (P₁ x₂ w)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ x' x₂) (P₃ z x')
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x' w x₂
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x') = ?b

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
#⊗ identity (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
· (mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w)
        ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x'))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x') #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
              (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
            · (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                 (P₂ x' x₁) (P₃ z x')
               #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
               · ((rmap_e P₂ x' x₁ x₂
                   #⊗ identity (P₃ z x'))
                  #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
                  · (sym_mon_braiding V
                       (P₂ x' x₂ ⊗ P₃ z x') (P₁ x₂ w)
                     · (mon_rassociator (P₁ x₂ w)
                          (P₂ x' x₂) (P₃ z x')
                        · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
                            P₁ P₂ x' w x₂
                          #⊗ identity (P₃ z x'))))))))) =
?b

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x') #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
     (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ x' x₁)
        (P₃ z x') #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
      · ((rmap_e P₂ x' x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (P₃ z x'))
         #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x' x₂ ⊗ P₃ z x')
              (P₁ x₂ w)
            · (mon_rassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ x' x₂)
                 (P₃ z x')
               · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x'
                   w x₂ #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')))))) =
?t2

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⟧
mon_rassociator (P₁ x₂ w) ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ x' x₁)
  (P₃ z x')
· ((identity (P₁ x₂ w) #⊗ rmap_e P₂ x' x₁ x₂)
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x' w x₂
     #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')) = ?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⟧
(identity (P₁ x₂ w) #⊗ rmap_e P₂ x' x₁ x₂)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z x')
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x' w x₂
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x') = ?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⟧
(identity (P₁ x₂ w) #⊗ rmap_e P₂ x' x₁ x₂
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x' w x₂)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z x') = ?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⟧
(identity (P₁ x₂ w)
 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ x' x₁)
 · mon_rassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ x' x₁)
     (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
 · sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w ⊗ P₂ x' x₁)
     (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
 · mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
     (P₂ x' x₁)
 · lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w #⊗ identity (P₂ x' x₁)
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x' w x₁)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z x') = ?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⟧
(identity (P₁ x₂ w)
 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ x' x₁))
#⊗ identity (P₃ z x')
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ x' x₁) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w ⊗ P₂ x' x₁)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ x' x₁)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')
· (lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w #⊗ identity (P₂ x' x₁))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x' w x₁
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x') = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
#⊗ identity (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
· (mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w)
        ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x'))
      · (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ x' x₁)
           (P₃ z x') #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V
              ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
              (P₁ x₂ w)
            · (mon_rassociator (P₁ x₂ w)
                 ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ x' x₁)
                 (P₃ z x')
               · ((identity (P₁ x₂ w)
                   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V
                        (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ x' x₁))
                  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')
                  · mon_rassociator (P₁ x₂ w)
                      (P₂ x' x₁) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                    #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')
                  · sym_mon_braiding V
                      (P₁ x₂ w ⊗ P₂ x' x₁)
                      (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                    #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')
                  · mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                      (P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ x' x₁)
                    #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')
                  · (lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w
                     #⊗ identity (P₂ x' x₁))
                    #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')
                  · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂
                      x' w x₁ #⊗ identity (P₃ z x'))))))) =
sym_mon_braiding V ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
  (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
· identity (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x') #⊗ lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x') (P₁ x₁ w)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x₁ w) (P₂ x' x₁) (P₃ z x')
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x' w x₁
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
#⊗ identity (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x'))
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ x' x₁) (P₃ z x')
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x') (P₁ x₂ w)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x₂ w)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ x' x₁) (P₃ z x')
· (identity (P₁ x₂ w)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ x' x₁))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ x' x₁) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w ⊗ P₂ x' x₁)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ x' x₁)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')
· (lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w #⊗ identity (P₂ x' x₁))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x' w x₁
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x') =
sym_mon_braiding V ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
  (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
· identity (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x') #⊗ lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x') (P₁ x₁ w)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x₁ w) (P₂ x' x₁) (P₃ z x')
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x' w x₁
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
#⊗ identity (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x'))
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ x' x₁) (P₃ z x')
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x') (P₁ x₂ w)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x₂ w)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ x' x₁) (P₃ z x')
· (identity (P₁ x₂ w)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ x' x₁))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ x' x₁) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w ⊗ P₂ x' x₁)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ x' x₁)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')
· (lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w #⊗ identity (P₂ x' x₁))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x') =
sym_mon_braiding V ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
  (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
· identity (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x') #⊗ lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x') (P₁ x₁ w)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x₁ w) (P₂ x' x₁) (P₃ z x')

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
  (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
· identity (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x') #⊗ lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x') (P₁ x₁ w)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x₁ w) (P₂ x' x₁) (P₃ z x') =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
#⊗ identity (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x'))
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ x' x₁) (P₃ z x')
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x') (P₁ x₂ w)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x₂ w)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ x' x₁) (P₃ z x')
· (identity (P₁ x₂ w)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ x' x₁))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ x' x₁) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w ⊗ P₂ x' x₁)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ x' x₁)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')
· (lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w #⊗ identity (P₂ x' x₁))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
  (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
· identity (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x') #⊗ lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x') (P₁ x₁ w)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x₁ w) (P₂ x' x₁) (P₃ z x') = 
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⟧
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
#⊗ identity (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x'))
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ x' x₁) (P₃ z x')
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x') (P₁ x₂ w)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x₂ w)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ x' x₁) (P₃ z x')
· (identity (P₁ x₂ w)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ x' x₁))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ x' x₁) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w ⊗ P₂ x' x₁)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ x' x₁)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')
· (lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w #⊗ identity (P₂ x' x₁))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
  (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
· identity (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x') #⊗ lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x') (P₁ x₁ w)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x₁ w) (P₂ x' x₁) (P₃ z x') = 
?b

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
  (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
· (identity (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x') #⊗ lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
        (P₁ x₁ w)
      · mon_rassociator (P₁ x₁ w) (P₂ x' x₁) (P₃ z x'))) =
?b

· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x') (P₁ x₁ w)
   · mon_rassociator (P₁ x₁ w) (P₂ x' x₁) (P₃ z x')) =
?t2

x': C₃
a: V
