sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
  ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
· (mon_rassociator ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
     (P₂ x' x₁) (P₃ z x')
   · (lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w #⊗ identity (P₂ x' x₁))
     #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')) = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
  (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
     ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
   · (mon_rassociator ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
        (P₂ x' x₁) (P₃ z x')
      · (lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w #⊗ identity (P₂ x' x₁))
        #⊗ identity (P₃ z x'))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
#⊗ identity (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x'))
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ x' x₁) (P₃ z x')
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x') (P₁ x₂ w)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x₂ w)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ x' x₁) (P₃ z x')
· (identity (P₁ x₂ w)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ x' x₁))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ x' x₁) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w ⊗ P₂ x' x₁)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ x' x₁)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')
· (lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w #⊗ identity (P₂ x' x₁))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
  (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
· mon_rassociator ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
    (P₂ x' x₁) (P₃ z x')
· (lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w #⊗ identity (P₂ x' x₁))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x') =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
#⊗ identity (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x'))
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ x' x₁) (P₃ z x')
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x') (P₁ x₂ w)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x₂ w)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ x' x₁) (P₃ z x')
· (identity (P₁ x₂ w)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ x' x₁))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ x' x₁) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w ⊗ P₂ x' x₁)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ x' x₁)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')
· (lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w #⊗ identity (P₂ x' x₁))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
  (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
· mon_rassociator ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
    (P₂ x' x₁) (P₃ z x') =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
#⊗ identity (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x'))
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ x' x₁) (P₃ z x')
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x') (P₁ x₂ w)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x₂ w)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ x' x₁) (P₃ z x')
· (identity (P₁ x₂ w)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ x' x₁))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ x' x₁) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w ⊗ P₂ x' x₁)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ x' x₁)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
sym_mon_braiding V ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
  (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
· mon_rassociator ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
    (P₂ x' x₁) (P₃ z x') =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
#⊗ identity (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x')
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x'))
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ x' x₁) (P₃ z x')
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ x' x₁ ⊗ P₃ z x') (P₁ x₂ w)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x₂ w)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ x' x₁) (P₃ z x')
· (identity (P₁ x₂ w)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ x' x₁))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ x' x₁) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w ⊗ P₂ x' x₁)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ x' x₁)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x')

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
∏ o o0 o1 o2 : V,
sym_mon_braiding V (o ⊗ o0) (o1 ⊗ o2)
· sym_mon_braiding V (o1 ⊗ o2) (o ⊗ o0)
· mon_rassociator (o ⊗ o0) o1 o2 =
sym_mon_braiding V o o0 #⊗ identity (o1 ⊗ o2)
· mon_lassociator o0 o (o1 ⊗ o2)
· sym_mon_braiding V o0 (o ⊗ (o1 ⊗ o2))
· mon_rassociator o o1 o2 #⊗ identity o0
· sym_mon_braiding V (o ⊗ o1 ⊗ o2) o0
· mon_rassociator o0 (o ⊗ o1) o2
· (identity o0 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V o o1)
  #⊗ identity o2
· mon_rassociator o0 o1 o #⊗ identity o2
· sym_mon_braiding V (o0 ⊗ o1) o #⊗ identity o2
· mon_rassociator o o0 o1 #⊗ identity o2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
sym_mon_braiding V (v₁ ⊗ v₂) (v₃ ⊗ v₄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (v₃ ⊗ v₄) (v₁ ⊗ v₂)
· mon_rassociator (v₁ ⊗ v₂) v₃ v₄ =
sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₂ #⊗ identity (v₃ ⊗ v₄)
· mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ (v₃ ⊗ v₄)
· sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₁ ⊗ (v₃ ⊗ v₄))
· mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₄ #⊗ identity v₂
· sym_mon_braiding V (v₁ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₄) v₂
· mon_rassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄
· (identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃)
  #⊗ identity v₄
· mon_rassociator v₂ v₃ v₁ #⊗ identity v₄
· sym_mon_braiding V (v₂ ⊗ v₃) v₁ #⊗ identity v₄
· mon_rassociator v₁ v₂ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
identity (v₁ ⊗ v₂ ⊗ (v₃ ⊗ v₄))
· mon_rassociator (v₁ ⊗ v₂) v₃ v₄ =
sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₂ #⊗ identity (v₃ ⊗ v₄)
· mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ (v₃ ⊗ v₄)
· sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₁ ⊗ (v₃ ⊗ v₄))
· mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₄ #⊗ identity v₂
· sym_mon_braiding V (v₁ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₄) v₂
· mon_rassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄
· (identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃)
  #⊗ identity v₄
· mon_rassociator v₂ v₃ v₁ #⊗ identity v₄
· sym_mon_braiding V (v₂ ⊗ v₃) v₁ #⊗ identity v₄
· mon_rassociator v₁ v₂ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
mon_rassociator (v₁ ⊗ v₂) v₃ v₄ =
sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₂ #⊗ identity (v₃ ⊗ v₄)
· mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ (v₃ ⊗ v₄)
· sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₁ ⊗ (v₃ ⊗ v₄))
· mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₄ #⊗ identity v₂
· sym_mon_braiding V (v₁ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₄) v₂
· mon_rassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄
· (identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃)
  #⊗ identity v₄
· mon_rassociator v₂ v₃ v₁ #⊗ identity v₄
· sym_mon_braiding V (v₂ ⊗ v₃) v₁ #⊗ identity v₄
· mon_rassociator v₁ v₂ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₂ #⊗ identity (v₃ ⊗ v₄)
· mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ (v₃ ⊗ v₄)
· sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₁ ⊗ (v₃ ⊗ v₄))
· mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₄ #⊗ identity v₂
· sym_mon_braiding V (v₁ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₄) v₂
· mon_rassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄
· (identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃)
  #⊗ identity v₄
· mon_rassociator v₂ v₃ v₁ #⊗ identity v₄
· sym_mon_braiding V (v₂ ⊗ v₃) v₁ #⊗ identity v₄
· mon_rassociator v₁ v₂ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄ =
mon_rassociator (v₁ ⊗ v₂) v₃ v₄

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₂ #⊗ identity (v₃ ⊗ v₄)
· mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ (v₃ ⊗ v₄)
· sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₁ ⊗ (v₃ ⊗ v₄))
· mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₄ #⊗ identity v₂
· sym_mon_braiding V (v₁ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₄) v₂
· mon_rassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄
· (identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃)
  #⊗ identity v₄
· mon_rassociator v₂ v₃ v₁ #⊗ identity v₄
· sym_mon_braiding V (v₂ ⊗ v₃) v₁ #⊗ identity v₄
· mon_rassociator v₁ v₂ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄ = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
?b = mon_rassociator (v₁ ⊗ v₂) v₃ v₄

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₂ #⊗ identity (v₃ ⊗ v₄)
· (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ (v₃ ⊗ v₄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₁ ⊗ (v₃ ⊗ v₄))
      · (mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₄ #⊗ identity v₂
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (v₁ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₄) v₂
            · (mon_rassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄
               · ((identity v₂
                   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃)
                  #⊗ identity v₄
                  · (mon_rassociator v₂ v₃ v₁
                     #⊗ identity v₄
                     · (sym_mon_braiding V (v₂ ⊗ v₃)
                          v₁ #⊗ identity v₄
                        · mon_rassociator v₁ v₂ v₃
                          #⊗ identity v₄)))))))) = 
?b

w: C₁
x': C₃
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₂ #⊗ identity (v₃ ⊗ v₄)
· (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ (v₃ ⊗ v₄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₁ ⊗ (v₃ ⊗ v₄))
      · (mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₄ #⊗ identity v₂
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (v₁ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₄) v₂
            · (mon_rassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄
               · (identity v₂
                  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃
                  · (mon_rassociator v₂ v₃ v₁
                     · (sym_mon_braiding V (v₂ ⊗ v₃)
                          v₁
                        · mon_rassociator v₁ v₂ v₃)))
                 #⊗ identity v₄))))) = ?b

w: C₁
x': C₃
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V

· (sym_mon_braiding V (v₁ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₄) v₂
   · mon_rassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄) = ?t2

E₁: enrichment C₁ V

z: C₄

w: C₁
x': C₃
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V

E₁: enrichment C₁ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
identity v₂ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₄
· mon_rassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄ = ?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : V ⟦ v₂ ⊗ (v₁ ⊗ (v₃ ⊗ v₄)),
         v₂ ⊗ v₁ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₄ ⟧,
   z · mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄)
  mon_rassociator_rassociator: (λ z : V ⟦ v₂ ⊗ (v₁ ⊗ (v₃ ⊗ v₄)),
       v₂ ⊗ v₁ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₄ ⟧,
 z · mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄)
  (mon_rassociator v₂ v₁ (v₃ ⊗ v₄)
   · mon_rassociator (v₂ ⊗ v₁) v₃ v₄) =
(λ z : V ⟦ v₂ ⊗ (v₁ ⊗ (v₃ ⊗ v₄)),
       v₂ ⊗ v₁ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₄ ⟧,
 z · mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄)
  (identity v₂ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₄
   · mon_rassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄
   · mon_rassociator v₂ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄)
identity v₂ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₄
· mon_rassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄ = ?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : V ⟦ v₂ ⊗ (v₁ ⊗ (v₃ ⊗ v₄)),
         v₂ ⊗ v₁ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₄ ⟧,
   z · mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄)
  mon_rassociator_rassociator: mon_rassociator v₂ v₁ (v₃ ⊗ v₄)
· mon_rassociator (v₂ ⊗ v₁) v₃ v₄
· mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄ =
identity v₂ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₄
· mon_rassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄
· mon_rassociator v₂ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄
· mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄
identity v₂ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₄
· mon_rassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄ = ?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
p: mon_rassociator v₂ v₁ (v₃ ⊗ v₄)
· (mon_rassociator (v₂ ⊗ v₁) v₃ v₄
   · mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄) =
identity v₂ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₄
· (mon_rassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄
   · (mon_rassociator v₂ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄
      · mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄))
identity v₂ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₄
· mon_rassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄ = ?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos

P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄

· (mon_rassociator (v₂ ⊗ v₁) v₃ v₄
   · mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄) =
identity v₂ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₄
· (mon_rassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄
   · (mon_rassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
      · mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃) #⊗ identity v₄)
identity v₂ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₄
· mon_rassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄ = ?t2

   · mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄) =
identity v₂ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₄
· (mon_rassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄
   · identity (v₂ ⊗ (v₁ ⊗ v₃)) #⊗ identity v₄)
identity v₂ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₄
· mon_rassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄ = ?t2

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
p: mon_rassociator v₂ v₁ (v₃ ⊗ v₄)
· (mon_rassociator (v₂ ⊗ v₁) v₃ v₄
   · mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄) =
identity v₂ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₄
· mon_rassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄
identity v₂ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₄
· mon_rassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄ = ?t2

      exact (!p).
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₂ #⊗ identity (v₃ ⊗ v₄)
· (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ (v₃ ⊗ v₄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₁ ⊗ (v₃ ⊗ v₄))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (v₁ ⊗ (v₃ ⊗ v₄)) v₂
         · (mon_rassociator v₂ v₁ (v₃ ⊗ v₄)
            · (mon_rassociator (v₂ ⊗ v₁) v₃ v₄
               · mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
                 #⊗ identity v₄)))))
· (identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃
   · mon_rassociator v₂ v₃ v₁
   · sym_mon_braiding V (v₂ ⊗ v₃) v₁
   · mon_rassociator v₁ v₂ v₃) #⊗ identity v₄ =
mon_rassociator (v₁ ⊗ v₂) v₃ v₄

P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄

x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₂ #⊗ identity (v₃ ⊗ v₄)
· (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ (v₃ ⊗ v₄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₁ ⊗ (v₃ ⊗ v₄))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (v₁ ⊗ (v₃ ⊗ v₄)) v₂
         · (mon_rassociator v₂ v₁ (v₃ ⊗ v₄)
            · (mon_rassociator (v₂ ⊗ v₁) v₃ v₄
               · (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
                  #⊗ identity v₄
                  · (identity v₂
                     #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃
                     · (mon_rassociator v₂ v₃ v₁
                        · (sym_mon_braiding V
                             (v₂ ⊗ v₃) v₁
                           · mon_rassociator v₁ v₂ v₃)))
                    #⊗ identity v₄)))))) =
mon_rassociator (v₁ ⊗ v₂) v₃ v₄

#⊗ (identity v₃ #⊗ identity v₄)
· (mon_rassociator (v₂ ⊗ v₁) v₃ v₄

      · mon_rassociator v₂ v₃ v₁
      · sym_mon_braiding V (v₂ ⊗ v₃) v₁
      · mon_rassociator v₁ v₂ v₃) #⊗ identity v₄) =
mon_rassociator (v₁ ⊗ v₂) v₃ v₄

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₂
#⊗ (identity v₃ #⊗ identity v₄)
· mon_rassociator (v₂ ⊗ v₁) v₃ v₄
· (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
   · identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃
   · mon_rassociator v₂ v₃ v₁
   · sym_mon_braiding V (v₂ ⊗ v₃) v₁
   · mon_rassociator v₁ v₂ v₃) #⊗ identity v₄ =
mon_rassociator (v₁ ⊗ v₂) v₃ v₄

v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
mon_rassociator (v₁ ⊗ v₂) v₃ v₄
· (sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₂ #⊗ identity v₃)
  #⊗ identity v₄
· (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
   · identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃
   · mon_rassociator v₂ v₃ v₁
   · sym_mon_braiding V (v₂ ⊗ v₃) v₁
   · mon_rassociator v₁ v₂ v₃) #⊗ identity v₄ =

P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
mon_rassociator (v₁ ⊗ v₂) v₃ v₄
· (sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₂ #⊗ identity v₃)
  #⊗ identity v₄
· (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
   · identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃
   · mon_rassociator v₂ v₃ v₁
   · sym_mon_braiding V (v₂ ⊗ v₃) v₁
   · mon_rassociator v₁ v₂ v₃) #⊗ identity v₄ =
mon_rassociator (v₁ ⊗ v₂) v₃ v₄
· identity (v₁ ⊗ v₂ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₄)

z: C₄

w: C₁
x': C₃
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
mon_rassociator (v₁ ⊗ v₂) v₃ v₄
· ((sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₂ #⊗ identity v₃)
   #⊗ identity v₄
   · (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
      · (identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃
         · (mon_rassociator v₂ v₃ v₁
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (v₂ ⊗ v₃) v₁
               · mon_rassociator v₁ v₂ v₃))))
     #⊗ identity v₄) =

· identity (v₁ ⊗ v₂ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₄)

· (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
   · (identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃
      · (mon_rassociator v₂ v₃ v₁

  #⊗ identity v₄ = identity (v₁ ⊗ v₂ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₄)

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
?b = identity (v₁ ⊗ v₂ ⊗ v₃)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₂ #⊗ identity v₃
· (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
   · (mon_rassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
      · sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₁ #⊗ identity v₃)) = 
?b

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
· (mon_rassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
   · sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₁ #⊗ identity v₃) = ?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃ · mon_rassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
· sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₁ #⊗ identity v₃ = ?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
identity (v₂ ⊗ v₁ ⊗ v₃)
· sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₁ #⊗ identity v₃ = ?t2

      apply id_left.
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₂ #⊗ identity v₃
· sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₁ #⊗ identity v₃ =
identity (v₁ ⊗ v₂ ⊗ v₃)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
(sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₂ · sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₁)
#⊗ identity v₃ = identity (v₁ ⊗ v₂ ⊗ v₃)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
x': C₃
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
identity (v₁ ⊗ v₂) #⊗ identity v₃ =
identity (v₁ ⊗ v₂ ⊗ v₃)

    apply tensor_id_id.
  Qed.

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
enriched_profunctor_transformation_data
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃))
  (comp_enriched_profunctor
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
enriched_profunctor_transformation_data
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃))
  (comp_enriched_profunctor
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
V
⟦ comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w,
comp_enriched_profunctor
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w ⟧

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
∏ y : C₂,
V ⟦ P₁ y w ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z y,
comp_enriched_profunctor
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w ⟧
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
∏ y₁ y₂ : C₂,
lmap_e P₁ y₂ y₁ w
#⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z y₁)
· ?fs y₁ =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₁ y₂ w)
#⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ y₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z y₁)
· identity (P₁ y₂ w)
  #⊗ rmap_e (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z y₁ y₂
· ?fs y₂

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
∏ y : C₂,
V ⟦ P₁ y w ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z y,
comp_enriched_profunctor
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w ⟧
 exact (λ x,
             sym_mon_braiding _ _ _
             · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x w #⊗ identity _)
             · internal_eval _ _).
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
∏ y₁ y₂ : C₂,
lmap_e P₁ y₂ y₁ w
#⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z y₁)
· (λ x : C₂,
   sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x)
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x w
     #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
   · internal_eval (P₁ x w)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w)) y₁ =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₁ y₂ w)
#⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ y₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z y₁)
· identity (P₁ y₂ w)
  #⊗ rmap_e (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z y₁ y₂
· (λ x : C₂,
   sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x)
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x w
     #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
   · internal_eval (P₁ x w)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w)) y₂
 
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
x₁, x₂: C₂
lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w
#⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₁ w)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x₁ w
     #⊗ identity (P₁ x₁ w)
   · internal_eval (P₁ x₁ w)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
#⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
· identity (P₁ x₂ w)
  #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P₂ P₃ z x₁ x₂
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
          ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₂)
      · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₂))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₂ w)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₂)
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x₂ w
     #⊗ identity (P₁ x₂ w)
   · internal_eval (P₁ x₂ w)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w))

      exact (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data_eq z x₁ x₂ w).
  Defined.

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x: C₂
w: C₁
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w x
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z w =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
  (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x w
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x: C₂
w: C₁
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w x
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z w =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
  (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x w
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x: C₂
w: C₁
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w x
· from_comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w
    (λ x : C₂,
     sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x)
     · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x w
       #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
     · internal_eval (P₁ x w)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w))
    (λ x₁ x₂ : C₂,
     lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data_eq z x₁ x₂ w) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
  (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x w
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
x: C₂
w: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
  (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x w
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
  (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x w
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w)

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  (** ** 1.3. The laws *)
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws
  lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws
  lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₄) (y : C₁),
identity (E₄ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data x₁ y
· lmap_e
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) x₁ x₂ y =
lmap_e
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)) x₁ x₂ y
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data x₂ y
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
∏ (x : C₄) (y₁ y₂ : C₁),
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data x y₁
· rmap_e
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) x y₁ y₂ =
rmap_e
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)) x y₁ y₂
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data x y₂

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₄) (y : C₁),
identity (E₄ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data x₁ y
· lmap_e
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) x₁ x₂ y =
lmap_e
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)) x₁ x₂ y
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data x₂ y
 
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
#⊗ lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₁ w
· (identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       ((E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w)
   · internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w)) =
identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    ((E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₂ w)
· internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₂ w)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₂ w

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
internal_transpose
  (identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₁ w
   · (identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          ((E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂
               w)
      · internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w))) =
internal_transpose
  (identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       ((E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₂ w)
   · internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₂ w)
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₂ w)

             ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob

                 z₂ w)
        · internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂
               w))) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ w y
· internal_transpose
    (identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w
     · sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         ((E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₂ w)
     · internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₂ w)
     · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₂ w)

                (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob

                   z₂ w))))
   #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w)) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ w x
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (internal_transpose
     (identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           ((E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₂ w)
         · (internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₂ w)
            · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₂
                w))) #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w))

comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ w x
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (internal_transpose
     (identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₁ w
      · (identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
              z₂ w
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
              ((E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                   z₂ w)
            · internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                   z₂ w))))
   #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w)) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ w x
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (internal_transpose
     (identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           ((E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₂ w)
         · (internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₂ w)
            · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₂
                w))) #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w))

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

w: C₁
x: C₂
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ w x
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ w)
        (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · (identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         #⊗ lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₁ w
         · (identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                 z₁ z₂ w
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                 ((E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                      P₃ z₂ w)
               · internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                      P₃ z₂ w)))))
   #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w)) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ w x
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ w)
        (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · (identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
              ((E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₂
                   w)
            · (internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)
                    z₂ w)
               · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data
                   z₂ w))))
   #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w))

#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V

       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ w)
    (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

· identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ w x
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ w)

· identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

· internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₂ w)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₂ w

sym_mon_braiding V
  (P₁ x w ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
  (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

· internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w) =
sym_mon_braiding V
  (P₁ x w ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)

· identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

· (identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

              z₂ w

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

w: C₁
x: C₂
identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ w x
· (identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₁ w
   · (identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           ((E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

                w)
         · internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂
                w)))) =
identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ w x
· (identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        ((E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₂ w)
      · (internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₂ w)

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ w x
· (identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₁ w
   · (identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

           ((E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂
                w)
         · internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂
                w)))) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
?b =
identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ w x
· (identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

· (identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁

· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)

· internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w)

E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ w x
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w)
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₂ w) = ?y'

        apply comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_comm.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  (P₁ x w ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (P₁ x w ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
     (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w x
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₂ w) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  (P₁ x w ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x w
     #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
   · internal_eval (P₁ x w)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w)
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w)

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  (P₁ x w ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (P₁ x w ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
     (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor P₁
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w x
      · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₂ w)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  (P₁ x w ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
· ((sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
      (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
    · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x w
       #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
       · (internal_eval (P₁ x w)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
               w)
          · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
              z₂ w))) #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w))

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄

x: C₂
sym_mon_braiding V
  (P₁ x w ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
  (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor P₁

   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₂ w) =

· internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w)

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
internal_lam
  (sym_mon_braiding V
     (P₁ x w ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
     (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor P₁
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w x
      · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₂ w)) =

       · (internal_eval (P₁ x w)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
               w)
          · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
              z₂ w))) #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w))

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
internal_transpose
  (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (P₁ x w ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
        (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · (comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor P₁
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w x
         · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₂ w))) =
internal_transpose
  (internal_lam
     ((sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
       · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x w
          #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
          · (internal_eval (P₁ x w)
               (comp_enriched_profunctor
                  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                  z₁ w)
             · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                 z₁ z₂ w)))
      #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w)))

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
∏ y : C₃,
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
· internal_transpose
    (internal_lam
       (sym_mon_braiding V
          (P₁ x w
           ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
          (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        · (comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor P₁
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w
             x
           · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₂ w))) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
· internal_transpose
    (internal_lam
       ((sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
         · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x w
            #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
            · (internal_eval (P₁ x w)
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                    P₃ z₁ w)
               · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                   z₁ z₂ w)))
        #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        · internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂
               w)))

P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
· internal_transpose
    (internal_lam
       (sym_mon_braiding V
          (P₁ x w
           ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
          (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        · (comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor P₁
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w
             x
           · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₂ w))) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
· internal_transpose
    (internal_lam
       ((sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
         · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x w
            #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
            · (internal_eval (P₁ x w)
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                    P₃ z₁ w)
               · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                   z₁ z₂ w)))
        #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        · internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧),
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
 · internal_transpose
     (internal_lam
        (sym_mon_braiding V
           (P₁ x w
            ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
           (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · (comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor P₁
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w
              x
            · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₂
                w)))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    ((E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w) =
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
 · internal_transpose
     (internal_lam
        ((sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
          · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x
               w #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
             · (internal_eval (P₁ x w)
                  (comp_enriched_profunctor
                     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                     P₃ z₁ w)
                · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                    P₃ z₁ z₂ w)))
         #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂
                w)))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    ((E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w)

x: C₂
y: C₃
v: V
h: V ⟦ v, P₁ x w ⟧
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
 · internal_transpose
     (internal_lam
        (sym_mon_braiding V
           (P₁ x w
            ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
           (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w

     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w) =
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
 · internal_transpose
     (internal_lam
        ((sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
          · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x
               w #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
             · (internal_eval (P₁ x w)
                  (comp_enriched_profunctor
                     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                     P₃ z₁ w)
                · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                    P₃ z₁ z₂ w)))
         #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
v: V
h: V ⟦ v, P₁ x w ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y #⊗ h
· internal_transpose
    (internal_lam
       (sym_mon_braiding V
          (P₁ x w
           ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
          (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        · (comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor P₁
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w
             x
           · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₂ w)))
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    ((E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y #⊗ h
· internal_transpose
    (internal_lam
       (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
        #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        · ((lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x w
            #⊗ identity (P₁ x w))
           #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           · (internal_eval (P₁ x w)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                   z₁ w) #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
              · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
                  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                  z₁ z₂ w #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))
        · internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂
               w))) #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    ((E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
v: V
h: V ⟦ v, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) #⊗ h
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· internal_transpose
    (internal_lam
       (sym_mon_braiding V
          (P₁ x w
           ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
          (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        · (comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor P₁
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w
             x
           · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₂ w)))
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    ((E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w) =
identity (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) #⊗ h
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· internal_transpose
    (internal_lam
       (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
        #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        · ((lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x w
            #⊗ identity (P₁ x w))
           #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           · (internal_eval (P₁ x w)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                   z₁ w) #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
              · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
                  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                  z₁ z₂ w #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))
        · internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂
               w))) #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    ((E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
v: V
h: V ⟦ v, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) #⊗ h
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
   · (internal_transpose
        (internal_lam
           (sym_mon_braiding V
              (P₁ x w
               ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
              (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            · (comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor P₁
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁
                 z₂ w x
               · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data
                   z₂ w))) #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
      · internal_eval (P₁ x w)
          ((E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂
               w))) =
identity (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) #⊗ h
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
   · (internal_transpose
        (internal_lam
           (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
            #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            · ((lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁
                  x w #⊗ identity (P₁ x w))
               #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               · (internal_eval (P₁ x w)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor
                       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                       P₃ z₁ w)
                  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                  · (comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
                       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                       P₃ z₁ z₂ w
                     #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                     · internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                         (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                            (comp_enriched_profunctor
                               P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w))))))
      #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
      · internal_eval (P₁ x w)
          ((E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂
               w)))

comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
#⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· (internal_transpose
     (internal_lam
        (sym_mon_braiding V
           (P₁ x w
            ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
           (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

            · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₂

            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w)) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
#⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· (internal_transpose
     (internal_lam
        (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
         #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · ((lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x
               w #⊗ identity (P₁ x w))
            #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            · (internal_eval (P₁ x w)

                      (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                            P₂) P₃ z₂ w))))))
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
   · internal_eval (P₁ x w)
       ((E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w))

y: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
#⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x) (P₁ x w)
      · internal_lam
          (sym_mon_braiding V
             (P₁ x w

                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂

       ((E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w)) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
#⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x) (P₁ x w)

          (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)

                      (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                      P₃ z₁ z₂ w

                              P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w))))))
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)

x: C₂
y: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
#⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x) (P₁ x w)
   · internal_lam
       (sym_mon_braiding V
          (P₁ x w
           ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
          (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

#⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x) (P₁ x w)
   · internal_lam
       (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
        #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        · ((lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x w
            #⊗ identity (P₁ x w))
           #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           · (internal_eval (P₁ x w)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor

#⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x) (P₁ x w)
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V

· sym_mon_braiding V

     #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x w
        #⊗ identity (P₁ x w))
       #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     · internal_eval (P₁ x w)

sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) (P₁ x w)
· identity (P₁ x w)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
· internal_lam

  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
     #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x w
        #⊗ identity (P₁ x w))
       #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     · internal_eval (P₁ x w)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w)
       #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

   · internal_lam

w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V
       (P₁ x w ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
       (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     · (comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor P₁

        · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₂ w)) =

         #⊗ identity (P₁ x w))

        · (internal_eval (P₁ x w)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁

           · (comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
                z₂ w #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧),
(identity (P₁ x w)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
 · internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (P₁ x w ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
        (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · (comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor P₁
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w x
         · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₂ w)))
#⊗ h
· internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w) =
(identity (P₁ x w)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
 · internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
      #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · ((lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x w
          #⊗ identity (P₁ x w))
         #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · (internal_eval (P₁ x w)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                 z₁ w) #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            · (comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                 z₁ z₂ w #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               · internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                      P₃ z₂ w)))))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w)

      · ((lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x w
          #⊗ identity (P₁ x w))
         #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · (internal_eval (P₁ x w)

    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
v: V
h: V ⟦ v, E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (P₁ x w ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)) #⊗ h
· (identity (P₁ x w)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y)
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V
       (P₁ x w ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
       (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     · (comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor P₁
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w x
        · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₂ w))
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w) =
(identity (P₁ x w)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y) #⊗ h
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
     #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     · ((lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x w
         #⊗ identity (P₁ x w))
        #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        · (internal_eval (P₁ x w)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
                w) #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           · (comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
                z₂ w #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
              · internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                  (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                     P₃ z₂ w)))))
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w)

w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃

(identity (P₁ x w)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y) #⊗ h
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
     #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     · ((lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x w
         #⊗ identity (P₁ x w))
        #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        · (internal_eval (P₁ x w)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
                w) #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           · (comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
                z₂ w #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
              · internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                  (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                     P₃ z₂ w)))))
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w) =
identity (P₁ x w ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)) #⊗ h
· (identity (P₁ x w)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y)
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V
       (P₁ x w ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
       (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     · (comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor P₁
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w x
        · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₂ w))
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w)

· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
     #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     · ((lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x w
         #⊗ identity (P₁ x w))
        #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        · (internal_eval (P₁ x w)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
                w) #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           · (comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
                z₂ w #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
              · internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                  (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                     P₃ z₂ w)))))
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w) = 
?b

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
v: V
h: V ⟦ v, E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
(identity (P₁ x w)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y) #⊗ h =
?y'

        apply tensor_split.

· (identity (P₁ x w)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y)

                w) #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           · (comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
                z₂ w #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
              · internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                  (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                     P₃ z₂ w)))))
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w) =

   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y)
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

       (P₁ x w ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
       (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     · (comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor P₁
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w x
        · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₂ w))
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
v: V
h: V ⟦ v, E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (P₁ x w ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)) #⊗ h
· ((identity (P₁ x w)
    #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y)
   #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (internal_lam
        (sym_mon_braiding V
           (P₁ x w
            ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
           (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · (comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor P₁
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w
              x
            · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₂
                w)) #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w))) =
identity (P₁ x w ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)) #⊗ h
· ((identity (P₁ x w)
    #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y)
   #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (internal_lam
        (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
         #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · ((lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x
               w #⊗ identity (P₁ x w))
            #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            · (internal_eval (P₁ x w)
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                    P₃ z₁ w)
               #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               · (comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                    P₃ z₁ z₂ w
                  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                  · internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                            P₂) P₃ z₂ w)))))
      #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w)))

· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)

      #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

                      P₃ z₂ w)))))

w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃

 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y)
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (P₁ x w ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
    (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y)
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

· comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w

· internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category

P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄

w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y))
  (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (P₁ x w)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor P₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w x
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₂ w =
(identity (P₁ x w)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y)
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x w
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)) #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w)
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w)

  (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (P₁ x w)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor P₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w x
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₂ w = ?b

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category

#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x w
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)) #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w)

P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
    #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P₁ x w)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
        (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · lmap_e (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂
          x)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₂ x)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₂ x w
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w) = 
?t2

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· (((comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
     · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₂ P₃ z₁ z₂ x)
    #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    · internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₂ x))
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
   · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₂ x w
      #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
      · internal_eval (P₁ x w)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w))) =
?t2

P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄

((comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
  · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₂ P₃ z₁ z₂ x)
 #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
 · internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₂ x))
#⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₂ x w
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
   · internal_eval (P₁ x w)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w)) =
?t2

(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₂ P₃ z₁ z₂ x)
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₂ x) = ?y'

          apply comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_comm.

 · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₂ x w)
#⊗ identity (P₁ x w)

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
 · mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
 · identity (P₂ y x)
   #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       · lmap_e P₃ z₁ z₂ y)
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₂ x y
 · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₂ x w)
#⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w) = 
?t2

P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
 · mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
 · identity (P₂ y x)
   #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       · lmap_e P₃ z₁ z₂ y)) #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₂ x y
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₂ x w
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w) = 
?t2

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
