P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
 · (mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    · identity (P₂ y x)
      #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          · lmap_e P₃ z₁ z₂ y))) #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₂ x y
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
   · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₂ x w
      #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
      · internal_eval (P₁ x w)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w))) =
?t2

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₂ x y
#⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₂ x w
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
   · internal_eval (P₁ x w)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w)) =
?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₂ x y
#⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₂ x w
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w) = 
?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₂ x y
 · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₂ x w)
#⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w) = 
?t2

        apply lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_comm.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y))
  (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P₁ x w ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y))
   · (mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
        (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
           (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y ⊗ (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
              (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                 (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
               #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
               · (sym_mon_braiding V
                    (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                  #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
                  · ((sym_mon_braiding V
                        (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                        (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
                      · (mon_lassociator (P₂ y x)
                           (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                         · identity (P₂ y x)
                           #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V
                                 (P₃ z₁ y)
                                 (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                               · lmap_e P₃ z₁ z₂ y)))
                     #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
                     · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob
                         z₂ y x w))))))) =
(identity (P₁ x w)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y)
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x w
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)) #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w)
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y))
  (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P₁ x w ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y))
   · (mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
        (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
           (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y ⊗ (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
              (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                 (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
               #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
               · (sym_mon_braiding V
                    (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                  #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
                  · ((sym_mon_braiding V
                        (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                        (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
                      · (mon_lassociator (P₂ y x)
                           (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                         · identity (P₂ y x)
                           #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V
                                 (P₃ z₁ y)
                                 (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                               · lmap_e P₃ z₁ z₂ y)))
                     #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
                     · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob
                         z₂ y x w))))))) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
?b =
(identity (P₁ x w)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y)
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x w
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)) #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w)
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y))
  (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P₁ x w ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y))
   · (mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
        (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
           (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y ⊗ (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
              (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                 (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
               #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
               · (sym_mon_braiding V
                    (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                  #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
                  · ((sym_mon_braiding V
                        (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                        (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
                      · (mon_lassociator (P₂ y x)
                           (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                         · identity (P₂ y x)
                           #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V
                                 (P₃ z₁ y)
                                 (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                               · lmap_e P₃ z₁ z₂ y)))
                     #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
                     · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob
                         z₂ y x w))))))) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y))
  (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P₁ x w ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y))
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
    (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
    (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y ⊗ (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
    (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
    (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
   · mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
       (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · identity (P₂ y x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · lmap_e P₃ z₁ z₂ y)) #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z₂ y x w = 
?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
identity
  (P₁ x w ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) ⊗ (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
    (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
    (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y ⊗ (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
    (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
    (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
   · mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
       (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · identity (P₂ y x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · lmap_e P₃ z₁ z₂ y)) #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z₂ y x w = 
?b

P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄

y: C₃
mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
  (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
     (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y ⊗ (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
        (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
              (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
            · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                  (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
                · (mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
                     (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                   · identity (P₂ y x)
                     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z₁ y)
                           (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                         · lmap_e P₃ z₁ z₂ y)))
               #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
               · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob
                   z₂ y x w))))) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
        (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
      · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
          · (mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
               (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
             · identity (P₂ y x)
               #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z₁ y)
                     (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                   · lmap_e P₃ z₁ z₂ y)))
         #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
         · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z₂ y
             x w))) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄

w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
    (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
   · mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
       (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · identity (P₂ y x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · lmap_e P₃ z₁ z₂ y)) #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z₂ y x w =
?t2

?t2

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
 · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
    · mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
        (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    · identity (P₂ y x)
      #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          · lmap_e P₃ z₁ z₂ y))) #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z₂ y x w =
?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
 · sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
 · mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
 · identity (P₂ y x)
   #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       · lmap_e P₃ z₁ z₂ y)) #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z₂ y x w =
?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V

P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(identity (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y ⊗ (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
 · mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
 · identity (P₂ y x)
   #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       · lmap_e P₃ z₁ z₂ y)) #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z₂ y x w =
?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
 · identity (P₂ y x)
   #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       · lmap_e P₃ z₁ z₂ y)) #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z₂ y x w =
?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
  (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
     (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y ⊗ (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
   · ((mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
         (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       · identity (P₂ y x)
         #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z₁ y)
               (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) · lmap_e P₃ z₁ z₂ y))
      #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
      · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z₂ y x
          w)) =
(identity (P₁ x w)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y)
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x w
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)) #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w)
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
  (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
     (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y ⊗ (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
   · ((mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
         (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       · identity (P₂ y x)
         #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z₁ y)
               (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) · lmap_e P₃ z₁ z₂ y))
      #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
      · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z₂ y x
          w)) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
?b =
(identity (P₁ x w)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y)
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x w
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)) #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w)
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w)

P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄

x: C₂

mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
  (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
     (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y ⊗ (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
   · ((mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
  (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
     (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y ⊗ (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
   · ((mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
         (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       · identity (P₂ y x)
         #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z₁ y)
               (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) · lmap_e P₃ z₁ z₂ y))
      #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₂ y)
           (P₁ x w)
         · mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₂ y)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
           #⊗ identity (P₃ z₂ y)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w
             y))) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
  (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y ⊗ (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· ((mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    · identity (P₂ y x)
      #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          · lmap_e P₃ z₁ z₂ y)) #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₂ y) (P₁ x w)
      · mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₂ y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
        #⊗ identity (P₃ z₂ y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w y)) =
?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
  (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y ⊗ (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · identity (P₂ y x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · lmap_e P₃ z₁ z₂ y)) #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₂ y) (P₁ x w)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₂ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₂ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w y = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
  (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y ⊗ (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · identity (P₂ y x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · lmap_e P₃ z₁ z₂ y)) #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₂ y) (P₁ x w) = 
?y'

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ (mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    · identity (P₂ y x)
      #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          · lmap_e P₃ z₁ z₂ y))
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₂ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₂ y) (P₁ x w) = 
?y'

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ (mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    · identity (P₂ y x)
      #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          · lmap_e P₃ z₁ z₂ y))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₂ y)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₂ y) (P₁ x w)) =
?y'

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ (mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    · identity (P₂ y x)
      #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          · lmap_e P₃ z₁ z₂ y))
· identity (P₁ x w ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₂ y)) = ?y'

        apply id_right.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
  (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (identity (P₁ x w)
   #⊗ (mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
         (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       · identity (P₂ y x)
         #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z₁ y)
               (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) · lmap_e P₃ z₁ z₂ y))
   · mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₂ y)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
     #⊗ identity (P₃ z₂ y)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w y) =
(identity (P₁ x w)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y)
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x w
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)) #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w)
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w)

      
V: benabou_cosmos

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄

w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
  (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (identity (P₁ x w)
   #⊗ (mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
         (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       · identity (P₂ y x)
         #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z₁ y)
               (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) · lmap_e P₃ z₁ z₂ y))
   · mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₂ y)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
     #⊗ identity (P₃ z₂ y)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w y) =
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
?b =
(identity (P₁ x w)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y)
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x w
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)) #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w)
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
  (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (identity (P₁ x w)
   #⊗ (mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
         (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       · identity (P₂ y x)
         #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z₁ y)
               (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) · lmap_e P₃ z₁ z₂ y))
   · mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₂ y)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
     #⊗ identity (P₃ z₂ y)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w y) =
?b

     #⊗ identity (P₃ z₂ y)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in

identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ (identity (P₂ y x) #⊗ lmap_e P₃ z₁ z₂ y)

· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₂ y)

x: C₂
y: C₃

  ((E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· (identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ identity (P₂ y x))
  #⊗ lmap_e P₃ z₁ z₂ y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₂ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
  (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (identity (P₁ x w)
   #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
        (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (identity (P₁ x w)
      #⊗ (identity (P₂ y x)
          #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z₁ y)
               (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
      · (mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x)
           ((E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
         · (identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ identity (P₂ y x))
           #⊗ lmap_e P₃ z₁ z₂ y
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
           #⊗ identity (P₃ z₂ y)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w
             y))) =
(identity (P₁ x w)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y)
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x w
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)) #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w)
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
  (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x w)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
       (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x w)
  #⊗ (identity (P₂ y x)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x)
    ((E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· (identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ identity (P₂ y x))
  #⊗ lmap_e P₃ z₁ z₂ y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₂ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w y =
(identity (P₁ x w)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y)
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x w
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)) #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w)
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(identity (P₁ x w)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y)
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x w
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)) #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w)
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w) =
mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
  (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x w)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
       (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x w)
  #⊗ (identity (P₂ y x)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x)
    ((E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· (identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ identity (P₂ y x))
  #⊗ lmap_e P₃ z₁ z₂ y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₂ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w y

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(identity (P₁ x w)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y)
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x w
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)) #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w)
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w) = 
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
?b =
mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
  (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x w)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
       (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x w)
  #⊗ (identity (P₂ y x)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x)
    ((E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· (identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ identity (P₂ y x))
  #⊗ lmap_e P₃ z₁ z₂ y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₂ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w y

(identity (P₁ x w)

· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)

  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x w

· comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w) = 
?b

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)) #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x w
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)) #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w)
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w) = 
?b

#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)) #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x w
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)) #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w)

 · mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w y
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w)

       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w) =

P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄

w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) (P₁ x w)
 · (mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
    · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
       #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
       · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w y
          · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
              z₂ w)))) #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob

x: C₂
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) (P₁ x w)
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
   #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
      #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
      · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w y
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂
             w)) #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w) =

x: C₂
y: C₃

#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
   #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · ((comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
       #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)

P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
 #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
 · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in
      (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w y
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w))
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
 #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)) #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w y
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w)
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
 #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)) #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· ((comp_enriched_profunctor_in
      (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w y
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w)
   #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w)) =
?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in
   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w y
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w)
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w) = 
?t2

        apply (comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_comm (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃).
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) (P₁ x w)
   #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
      #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · ((comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
          #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y))
         #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y w
               ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
                z₂ w y)))) =
mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
  (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x w)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
       (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x w)
  #⊗ (identity (P₂ y x)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x)
    ((E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· (identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ identity (P₂ y x))
  #⊗ lmap_e P₃ z₁ z₂ y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₂ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w y

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) (P₁ x w)
   #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
      #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · ((comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
          #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y))
         #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y w
               ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
                z₂ w y)))) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
?b =
mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
  (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x w)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
       (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x w)
  #⊗ (identity (P₂ y x)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x)
    ((E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· (identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ identity (P₂ y x))
  #⊗ lmap_e P₃ z₁ z₂ y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₂ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w y

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) (P₁ x w)
   #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
      #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · ((comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
          #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y))
         #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y w
               ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
                z₂ w y)))) = ?b

#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) (P₁ x w)
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)) #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y w ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)

· comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor

?b

 · sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) (P₁ x w))

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)) #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y w ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
    (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w y =
mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
  (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x w)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
       (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x w)
  #⊗ (identity (P₂ y x)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x)
    ((E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· (identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ identity (P₂ y x))
  #⊗ lmap_e P₃ z₁ z₂ y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₂ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w y

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄

w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)) #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y w ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
    (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w y = 
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
?b =
mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
  (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x w)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
       (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x w)
  #⊗ (identity (P₂ y x)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x)
    ((E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· (identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ identity (P₂ y x))
  #⊗ lmap_e P₃ z₁ z₂ y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₂ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w y

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)) #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y w)
    (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y w)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · lmap_e P₃ z₁ z₂ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w y = ?t2

y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· ((comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
    #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)) #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (mon_lassociator
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y w) (P₃ z₁ y)
        (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · (identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y w)
         #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z₁ y)
               (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) · lmap_e P₃ z₁ z₂ y)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w
             y))) = ?t2

x: C₂

identity (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    · lmap_e P₃ z₁ z₂ y)

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
identity (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x) #⊗ lmap_e P₃ z₁ z₂ y
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z₂ y)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w y) =
?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
     (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
      · (mon_lassociator (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
           (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · (identity (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x)
            #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z₁ y)
                 (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            · identity (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x)
              #⊗ lmap_e P₃ z₁ z₂ y
            · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
               #⊗ identity (P₃ z₂ y)
               · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                   z₂ w y))))) =
mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
  (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x w)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
       (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x w)
  #⊗ (identity (P₂ y x)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x)
    ((E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· (identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ identity (P₂ y x))
  #⊗ lmap_e P₃ z₁ z₂ y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₂ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w y

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
    (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
    (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x) #⊗ lmap_e P₃ z₁ z₂ y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₂ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w y =
mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
  (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x w)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
       (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x w)
  #⊗ (identity (P₂ y x)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x)
    ((E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· (identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ identity (P₂ y x))
  #⊗ lmap_e P₃ z₁ z₂ y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₂ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₂ w y

· comp_enriched_profunctor_in

· identity (P₁ x w)

  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₂ y)

  #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)

  #⊗ (identity (P₂ y x)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x)
    ((E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
     (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
      · (mon_lassociator (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
           (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · identity (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x)
           #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z₁ y)
                (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))) =
mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
  (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (identity (P₁ x w)
   #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
        (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (identity (P₁ x w)
      #⊗ (identity (P₂ y x)
          #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z₁ y)
               (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
      · mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x)
          ((E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
     (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
      · (mon_lassociator (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
           (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · identity (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x)
           #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z₁ y)
                (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))) =
mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
  (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (identity (P₁ x w)
   #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
        (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x)
        (P₃ z₁ y ⊗ (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
      · (identity (P₁ x w) #⊗ identity (P₂ y x))
        #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z₁ y)
             (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))

w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
     (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
      · (mon_lassociator (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
           (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · identity (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x)

                (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))) =

  (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (identity (P₁ x w)
   #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)

   · (mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x)
        (P₃ z₁ y ⊗ (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
      · identity (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
    (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
    (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) =
mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
  (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x w)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
       (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x)
    (P₃ z₁ y ⊗ (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z₁ y) (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
    (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
    (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) =
mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
  (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x w)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
       (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x)
    (P₃ z₁ y ⊗ (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
    (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
    (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
?b =
mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
  (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x w)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
       (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x)
    (P₃ z₁ y ⊗ (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))

      
V: benabou_cosmos

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
    (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
    (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) = ?b

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
    (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) = ?y'

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
     (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)) = ?y'

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity
    (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y ⊗ (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)) =
?y'

        apply id_right.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
    (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) =
mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
  (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x w)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
       (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x)
    (P₃ z₁ y ⊗ (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
    (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) =
identity
  (P₁ x w ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) ⊗ (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
     (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · identity (P₁ x w)
     #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
          (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x)
       (P₃ z₁ y ⊗ (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
    (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) =
identity (P₁ x w ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y))
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
     (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · identity (P₁ x w)
     #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
          (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x)
       (P₃ z₁ y ⊗ (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
    (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) =
(mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
 · mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y))
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
     (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · identity (P₁ x w)
     #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
          (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x)
       (P₃ z₁ y ⊗ (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
    (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) =
mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
     (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · identity (P₁ x w)
     #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
          (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x)
       (P₃ z₁ y ⊗ (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
    (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) =
mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
   #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
        (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · (identity (P₁ x w)
         #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
              (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x)
             (P₃ z₁ y ⊗ (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_lassociator (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
  (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) =
mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
     (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (identity (P₁ x w)
      #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
           (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x)
          (P₃ z₁ y ⊗ (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_lassociator (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
  (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) =
mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
    (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x w)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
       (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x)
    (P₃ z₁ y ⊗ (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_lassociator (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
  (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) =
mon_lassociator (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
  (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x)
    (P₃ z₁ y ⊗ (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x)
    (P₃ z₁ y ⊗ (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄

w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_lassociator (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
  (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) =
mon_lassociator (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
  (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x)
     (P₃ z₁ y ⊗ (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
   · mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x)
       (P₃ z₁ y ⊗ (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_lassociator (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
  (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) =
mon_lassociator (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
  (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity
    (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x ⊗ (P₃ z₁ y ⊗ (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁, z₂: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_lassociator (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
  (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) =
mon_lassociator (P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
  (E₄ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

      apply idpath.
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
∏ (x : C₄) (y₁ y₂ : C₁),
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data x y₁
· rmap_e
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) x y₁ y₂ =
rmap_e
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)) x y₁ y₂
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data x y₂
 
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
#⊗ lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₁ z₂
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
       ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
        ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w)
   · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w)) =
identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P₁
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ w)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ w)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₁ w

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
internal_transpose
  (identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
   #⊗ lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₁ z₂
   · (identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
          ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
               w)
      · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w))) =
internal_transpose
  (identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P₁
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
       ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
        ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ w)
   · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ w)
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₁ w)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
∏ y : C₂,
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ y
· internal_transpose
    (identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
     #⊗ lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₁ z₂
     · (identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
        #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂
             w
        · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
            ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
             ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                 z₁ w)
        · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
               w))) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ y
· internal_transpose
    (identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
     #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P₁
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w
     · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
         ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
          ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ w)
     · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ w)
     · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₁ w)

      
V: benabou_cosmos

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ x
· internal_transpose
    (identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
     #⊗ lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₁ z₂
     · (identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
        #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂
             w
        · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
            ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
             ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                 z₁ w)
        · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
               w))) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ x
· internal_transpose
    (identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
     #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P₁
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w
     · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
         ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
          ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ w)
     · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ w)
     · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₁ w)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄ ⟧),
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ x
 · internal_transpose
     (identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
      #⊗ lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₁ z₂
      · (identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
              z₂ w
         · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
             ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
              ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                  z₁ w)
         · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
                w)))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w) =
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ x
 · internal_transpose
     (identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P₁
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
          ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ w)
      · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ w)
      · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₁ w))
#⊗ h
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w)

      
V: benabou_cosmos

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄

z₂, w: C₁

v: V
h: V ⟦ v, E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄ ⟧
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ x
 · internal_transpose
     (identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
      #⊗ lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₁ z₂
      · (identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
              z₂ w
         · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
             ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
              ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                  z₁ w)
         · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
                w)))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w) =
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ x
 · internal_transpose
     (identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P₁
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
          ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ w)
      · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ w)
      · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₁ w))
#⊗ h
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
v: V
h: V ⟦ v, E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄ ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ x #⊗ h
· internal_transpose
    (identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
     #⊗ lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₁ z₂
     · (identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
        #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂
             w
        · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
            ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
             ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                 z₁ w)
        · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
               w))) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ x #⊗ h
· internal_transpose
    (identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
     #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P₁
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w
     · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
         ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
          ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ w)
     · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ w)
     · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₁ w)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w)

      
V: benabou_cosmos

identity

· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ x
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· internal_transpose

     #⊗ lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₁ z₂
     · (identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
        #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂
             w
        · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
            ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
             ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                 z₁ w)
        · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
               w))) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w) =
identity
  (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x) #⊗ h
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ x
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· internal_transpose
    (identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
     #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P₁
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w
     · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
         ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
          ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ w)
     · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ w)
     · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₁ w)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w)

· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ x
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
   · (internal_transpose

         · (identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                 z₁ z₂ w
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
                 ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                      P₃ z₁ w)
               · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                      P₃ z₁ w))))
      #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
      · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w))) =
identity
  (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x) #⊗ h
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ x
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
   · (internal_transpose

         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P₁

              ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
               ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁

            · (internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)
                    z₁ w)
               · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data
                   z₁ w))) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
      · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w)))

#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· (internal_transpose

              z₂ w

              ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
               ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                   z₁ w)
            · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                   z₁ w)))) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob

comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ x
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· (internal_transpose

            ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁

         · (internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)

                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ w)
            · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₁
                w))) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w))

                      P₃ z₁ w)
               · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)

                      (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)

x: C₂
sym_mon_braiding V
  (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
  (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)

       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ x
