· identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w) =
sym_mon_braiding V
  (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
  (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ x
· identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ w)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ w)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₁ w

sym_mon_braiding V
  (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
  (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ x
   · (identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)

              z₂ w

               ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob

            · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                   z₁ w))))) =
sym_mon_braiding V
  (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
  (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ x
   · (identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P₁
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
           ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
            ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ w)
         · (internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ w)
            · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₁
                w))))

       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w)

 · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P₁

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ x
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P₁
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ w) = ?y'

        apply comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_comm.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
  (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
     (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w x
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₁ w) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
  (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x z₂
     #⊗ identity (P₁ x z₂)
   · internal_eval (P₁ x z₂)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w)

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
  (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
     (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
   · (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor P₁
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w x
      · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₁ w)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
  (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
· ((sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂)
      (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
    · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x z₂
       #⊗ identity (P₁ x z₂)
       · (internal_eval (P₁ x z₂)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
               z₂)
          · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
              z₂ w))) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w))

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
sym_mon_braiding V
  (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
  (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor P₁
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w x
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₁ w) =
(sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂)
   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
 · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x z₂
    #⊗ identity (P₁ x z₂)
    · (internal_eval (P₁ x z₂)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂)
       · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w)))
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w)

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
internal_lam
  (sym_mon_braiding V
     (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
     (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
   · (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor P₁
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w x
      · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₁ w)) =
internal_lam
  ((sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂)
      (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
    · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x z₂

       · (internal_eval (P₁ x z₂)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
               z₂)
          · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
              z₂ w))) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w))

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
internal_transpose
  (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
        (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)

           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w x

         (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
       · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x z₂
          #⊗ identity (P₁ x z₂)
          · (internal_eval (P₁ x z₂)
               (comp_enriched_profunctor
                  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                  z₁ z₂)
             · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                 z₁ z₂ w))) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
      · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
∏ y : C₃,
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
· internal_transpose
    (internal_lam
       (sym_mon_braiding V
          (P₁ x z₂
           ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
          (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
        · (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor P₁
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w
             x
           · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₁ w))) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
· internal_transpose
    (internal_lam
       ((sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
         · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x
              z₂ #⊗ identity (P₁ x z₂)
            · (internal_eval (P₁ x z₂)
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                    P₃ z₁ z₂)
               · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                   z₁ z₂ w)))
        #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
        · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
               w)))

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
· internal_transpose
    (internal_lam
       (sym_mon_braiding V
          (P₁ x z₂
           ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
          (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
        · (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor P₁
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w
             x
           · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₁ w))) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
· internal_transpose
    (internal_lam
       ((sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
         · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x
              z₂ #⊗ identity (P₁ x z₂)
            · (internal_eval (P₁ x z₂)
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                    P₃ z₁ z₂)
               · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                   z₁ z₂ w)))
        #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
        · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, P₁ x z₂ ⟧),
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
 · internal_transpose
     (internal_lam
        (sym_mon_braiding V
           (P₁ x z₂
            ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
           (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
         · (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor P₁
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w
              x
            · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₁
                w)))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P₁ x z₂)
    ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w) =
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
 · internal_transpose
     (internal_lam
        ((sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
          · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x
               z₂ #⊗ identity (P₁ x z₂)
             · (internal_eval (P₁ x z₂)
                  (comp_enriched_profunctor
                     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                     P₃ z₁ z₂)
                · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                    P₃ z₁ z₂ w)))
         #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
         · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
                w)))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P₁ x z₂)
    ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w)

  #⊗ identity (P₁ x z₂)
· internal_eval (P₁ x z₂)

         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w) =
identity (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) #⊗ h
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x z₂)
· internal_transpose
    (internal_lam
       (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
        #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
        · ((lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x

           · (internal_eval (P₁ x z₂)

    ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)

   #⊗ identity (P₁ x z₂)

               w))) =
identity (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) #⊗ h
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x z₂)

           (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂)

· (internal_lam

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
#⊗ identity (P₁ x z₂)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x) (P₁ x z₂)
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V
       (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
       (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
     · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor P₁
         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w x
     · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₁ w) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
#⊗ identity (P₁ x z₂)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x) (P₁ x z₂)
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
     #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
     · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x z₂
        #⊗ identity (P₁ x z₂))
       #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
     · internal_eval (P₁ x z₂)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂)
       #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
     · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w
       #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
     · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) (P₁ x z₂)
· identity (P₁ x z₂)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V
       (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
       (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
     · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor P₁
         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w x
     · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₁ w) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) (P₁ x z₂)
· identity (P₁ x z₂)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
     #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
     · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x z₂
        #⊗ identity (P₁ x z₂))
       #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
     · internal_eval (P₁ x z₂)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂)
       #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
     · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w
       #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
     · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) (P₁ x z₂)
· (identity (P₁ x z₂)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
   · internal_lam
       (sym_mon_braiding V
          (P₁ x z₂
           ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
          (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
        · (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor P₁
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w
             x
           · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₁ w))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) (P₁ x z₂)
· (identity (P₁ x z₂)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
   · internal_lam
       (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
        #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
        · ((lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x
              z₂ #⊗ identity (P₁ x z₂))
           #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
           · (internal_eval (P₁ x z₂)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                   z₁ z₂) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
              · (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                   z₁ z₂ w #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
                 · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
                     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                           P₂) P₃ z₁ w))))))

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category

E₂: enrichment C₂ V

P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
identity (P₁ x z₂)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V
       (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
       (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
     · (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor P₁
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w x
        · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₁ w)) =
identity (P₁ x z₂)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
     #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
     · ((lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x z₂
         #⊗ identity (P₁ x z₂))
        #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
        · (internal_eval (P₁ x z₂)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
                z₂) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
           · (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
                z₂ w #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
              · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
                  (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                     P₃ z₁ w)))))

x: C₂
y: C₃
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄ ⟧),
(identity (P₁ x z₂)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
 · internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
        (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
      · (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor P₁
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w x
         · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₁ w)))
#⊗ h
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w) =
(identity (P₁ x z₂)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
 · internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
      #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
      · ((lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x z₂
          #⊗ identity (P₁ x z₂))
         #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
         · (internal_eval (P₁ x z₂)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                 z₁ z₂) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
            · (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                 z₁ z₂ w #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
               · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                      P₃ z₁ w)))))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄

z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
v: V
h: V ⟦ v, E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄ ⟧
?b =
(identity (P₁ x z₂)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y) #⊗ h
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
     #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
     · ((lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x z₂
         #⊗ identity (P₁ x z₂))
        #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
        · (internal_eval (P₁ x z₂)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
                z₂) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
           · (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
                z₂ w #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
              · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
                  (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                     P₃ z₁ w)))))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w)

(identity (P₁ x z₂)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y) #⊗ h =
?y'

        apply tensor_split.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

x: C₂
y: C₃
v: V
h: V ⟦ v, E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄ ⟧
identity (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)) #⊗ h
· (identity (P₁ x z₂)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V
       (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
       (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
     · (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor P₁
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w x
        · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₁ w))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w) =
(identity (P₁ x z₂)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y) #⊗ h
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
     #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
     · ((lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x z₂
         #⊗ identity (P₁ x z₂))
        #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
        · (internal_eval (P₁ x z₂)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
                z₂) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
           · (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
                z₂ w #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
              · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
                  (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                     P₃ z₁ w)))))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w)

x: C₂
y: C₃

(identity (P₁ x z₂)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y) #⊗ h
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
     #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
     · ((lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x z₂
         #⊗ identity (P₁ x z₂))
        #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
        · (internal_eval (P₁ x z₂)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
                z₂) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
           · (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
                z₂ w #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
              · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
                  (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                     P₃ z₁ w)))))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w) =
identity (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)) #⊗ h
· (identity (P₁ x z₂)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V
       (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
       (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
     · (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor P₁
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w x
        · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₁ w))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w)

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

x: C₂
y: C₃

· ((identity (P₁ x z₂)
    #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
   · (internal_lam
        (sym_mon_braiding V
           (P₁ x z₂
            ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
           (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
         · (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor P₁
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w
              x
            · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₁
                w)) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
      · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w))) =
identity (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)) #⊗ h
· ((identity (P₁ x z₂)
    #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
   · (internal_lam
        (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
         #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
         · ((lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x
               z₂ #⊗ identity (P₁ x z₂))

            · (internal_eval (P₁ x z₂)
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor

                    P₃ z₁ z₂)
               #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)

                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                    P₃ z₁ z₂ w
                  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)

                      (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                            P₂) P₃ z₁ w)))))
      #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
      · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w)))

                 z₁ z₂ w #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)

   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)

y: C₃
(identity (P₁ x z₂)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
        (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
      · (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor P₁
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w x
         · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₁ w))
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w)) =
(identity (P₁ x z₂)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
      #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
      · ((lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x z₂
          #⊗ identity (P₁ x z₂))
         #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
         · (internal_eval (P₁ x z₂)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                 z₁ z₂) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
            · (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                 z₁ z₂ w #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
               · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                      P₃ z₁ w)))))
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(identity (P₁ x z₂)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
     (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
   · (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor P₁
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w x
      · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₁ w)) =
(identity (P₁ x z₂)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
   · ((lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x z₂
       #⊗ identity (P₁ x z₂))
      #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
      · (internal_eval (P₁ x z₂)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
              z₂) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
         · (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
              z₂ w #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
            · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                   z₁ w)))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(identity (P₁ x z₂)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
    (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor P₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w x
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₁ w =
(identity (P₁ x z₂)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x z₂
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x z₂)) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· internal_eval (P₁ x z₂)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y))
  (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (P₁ x z₂)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor P₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w x
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₁ w =
(identity (P₁ x z₂)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x z₂
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x z₂)) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· internal_eval (P₁ x z₂)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w)

P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄

sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y))
  (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (P₁ x z₂)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor P₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ z₂ w x
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₁ w = ?b

· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂)

  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x z₂

       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂)

· comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w)

  (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)

P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄

sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y))
  (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (P₁ x z₂)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y)
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
   · rmap_e P₁ x z₂ w
     #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z₁ w x)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z₁ w = ?b

P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄

y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y))
  (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
   #⊗ (identity (P₁ x z₂)
       #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
      · (rmap_e P₁ x z₂ w

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄

x: C₂
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y))
  (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
   #⊗ (identity (P₁ x z₂)
       #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
      · (rmap_e P₁ x z₂ w
         #⊗ identity
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
            · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x
                w #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
            · internal_eval (P₁ x w)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                   z₁ w))))) = ?b

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
#⊗ (identity (P₁ x z₂)
    #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y)
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
   · (rmap_e P₁ x z₂ w
      #⊗ identity
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
         · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x w
           #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
         · internal_eval (P₁ x w)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
                w)))) = ?t2

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
#⊗ (identity (P₁ x z₂)
    #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
· rmap_e P₁ x z₂ w
  #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x w
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w) = 
?t2

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄

y: C₃
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂)
  (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₁ x z₂))
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
· rmap_e P₁ x z₂ w
  #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x w
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)

  (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· ((identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₁ x z₂))
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
   · (rmap_e P₁ x z₂ w
      #⊗ identity

      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)

P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₁ x z₂))
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
· rmap_e P₁ x z₂ w
  #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x w
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w) = 
?t2

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

x: C₂
y: C₃

 · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x w)
#⊗ identity (P₁ x w)

    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w) =

        apply lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_comm.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y))
  (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂)
     (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)
        (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
      · (identity (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
         #⊗ rmap_e P₁ x z₂ w
         · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z₁ y
             x w))) =
(identity (P₁ x z₂)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x z₂
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x z₂)) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· internal_eval (P₁ x z₂)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y))
  (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂)
     (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)
        (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
      · (identity (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
         #⊗ rmap_e P₁ x z₂ w
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
              (P₁ x w)
            · mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x)
                (P₃ z₁ y)
            · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
              #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
            · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
                w y)))) =
(identity (P₁ x z₂)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x z₂
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x z₂)) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· internal_eval (P₁ x z₂)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y))
  (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂)
     (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)
        (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
      · (identity (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
         #⊗ rmap_e P₁ x z₂ w
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
              (P₁ x w)
            · mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x)
                (P₃ z₁ y)
            · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
              #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
            · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
                w y)))) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
?b =
(identity (P₁ x z₂)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x z₂
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x z₂)) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· internal_eval (P₁ x z₂)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w)

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y))
  (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂)
     (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)
        (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
      · (identity (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
         #⊗ rmap_e P₁ x z₂ w
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
              (P₁ x w)
            · mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x)
                (P₃ z₁ y)
            · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
              #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
            · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
                w y)))) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
identity (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) #⊗ rmap_e P₁ x z₂ w
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) (P₁ x w)
   · mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
     #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w y) =
?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
identity (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) #⊗ rmap_e P₁ x z₂ w
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) (P₁ x w)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w y = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)
· rmap_e P₁ x z₂ w #⊗ identity (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w y = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)
· (rmap_e P₁ x z₂ w #⊗ identity (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
   · (mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
      · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
         #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w
             y))) = ?t2

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄

x: C₂
y: C₃
rmap_e P₁ x z₂ w #⊗ identity (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· (mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
   · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
      #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w y)) =
?t2

y: C₃
rmap_e P₁ x z₂ w #⊗ identity (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w y = ?t2

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
rmap_e P₁ x z₂ w
#⊗ (identity (P₂ y x) #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y))
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w y = ?t2

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_rassociator ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x)
  (P₃ z₁ y)
· (rmap_e P₁ x z₂ w #⊗ identity (P₂ y x))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w y = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y))
  (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂)
     (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)
        (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
           ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)
         · (mon_rassociator ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)
              (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
            · (rmap_e P₁ x z₂ w #⊗ identity (P₂ y x))
              #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
            · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
              #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
            · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
                w y)))) =
(identity (P₁ x z₂)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x z₂
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x z₂)) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· internal_eval (P₁ x z₂)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y))
  (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂)
    (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)
    (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
    ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)
· mon_rassociator ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x)
    (P₃ z₁ y)
· (rmap_e P₁ x z₂ w #⊗ identity (P₂ y x))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w y =
(identity (P₁ x z₂)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x z₂
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x z₂)) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· internal_eval (P₁ x z₂)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(identity (P₁ x z₂)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x z₂
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x z₂)) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· internal_eval (P₁ x z₂)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y))
  (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂)
    (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)
    (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
    ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)
· mon_rassociator ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x)
    (P₃ z₁ y)
· (rmap_e P₁ x z₂ w #⊗ identity (P₂ y x))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w y

      
V: benabou_cosmos

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(identity (P₁ x z₂)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x z₂
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x z₂)) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· internal_eval (P₁ x z₂)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w) = 
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y))
  (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂)
    (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)
    (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
    ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)
· mon_rassociator ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x)
    (P₃ z₁ y)
· (rmap_e P₁ x z₂ w #⊗ identity (P₂ y x))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w y

· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂)

       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w) = 
?b

 · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x z₂)) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)

       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w) =

#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x z₂)) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· ((comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
    #⊗ identity (P₁ x z₂)) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
   · ((lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x z₂
       #⊗ identity (P₁ x z₂))
      #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
      · (internal_eval (P₁ x z₂)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
              z₂) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
         · (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
              z₂ w #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
            · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                   z₁ w))))) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
 #⊗ identity (P₁ x z₂)) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· ((lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x z₂
    #⊗ identity (P₁ x z₂)) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
   · (internal_eval (P₁ x z₂)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂)
      #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
      · (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w
         #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
         · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
                w)))) = ?t2

P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄

z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
 #⊗ identity (P₁ x z₂)) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x z₂
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x z₂)) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· internal_eval (P₁ x z₂)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w) = 
?t2

P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄

z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
((comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z₁ x y
  · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z₁ x z₂)
 #⊗ identity (P₁ x z₂)
 · internal_eval (P₁ x z₂)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂)
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap

x: C₂
y: C₃
(lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z₁ y x z₂
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w)

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) (P₁ x z₂)
 · mon_rassociator (P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y z₂ x
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ y
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w) = 
?t2

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) (P₁ x z₂)
 · (mon_rassociator (P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
    · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y z₂ x
       #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
       · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂
            y
          · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
              z₂ w)))) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w) = 
?t2

P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄

z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) (P₁ x z₂)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
   · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y z₂ x
      #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
      · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ y
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂
             w)) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄))
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w) = 
?t2

x: C₂
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) (P₁ x z₂)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
   · ((comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y z₂ x
       #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
       · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂
            y

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y z₂ x
 #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
 · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in
      (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ y
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w))
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)

P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y z₂ x
 #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ y
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w)

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y z₂ x
 #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· ((comp_enriched_profunctor_in
      (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ y
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w)) =
?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in
   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ y
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w) = 
?t2

        apply (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_comm (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃).
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) (P₁ x z₂)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
   · (mon_rassociator (P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
      #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
      · ((comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y z₂ x
          #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y))
         #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y z₂
               ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
            · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
                z₂ w y)))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y))
  (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂)
    (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)
    (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
    ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)
· mon_rassociator ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x)
    (P₃ z₁ y)
· (rmap_e P₁ x z₂ w #⊗ identity (P₂ y x))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w y

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) (P₁ x z₂)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
   · (mon_rassociator (P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
      #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
      · ((comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y z₂ x
          #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y))
         #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y z₂
               ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
            · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
                z₂ w y)))) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y))
  (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂)
    (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)
    (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
    ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)
· mon_rassociator ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x)
    (P₃ z₁ y)
· (rmap_e P₁ x z₂ w #⊗ identity (P₂ y x))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w y

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) (P₁ x z₂)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
   · (mon_rassociator (P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
      #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
      · ((comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y z₂ x
          #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y))
         #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y z₂
               ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
            · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
                z₂ w y)))) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) (P₁ x z₂)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y z₂ x
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y z₂ ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
    (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w y = 
?b

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_rassociator (P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y z₂ x
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y z₂ ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
    (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w y =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y))
  (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂)
    (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)
    (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
    ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)
· mon_rassociator ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x)
    (P₃ z₁ y)
· (rmap_e P₁ x z₂ w #⊗ identity (P₂ y x))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w y

#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y z₂ x
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V

    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ z₂ w y =

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

x: C₂
y: C₃
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y))
  (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂)
    (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)

· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)

· mon_rassociator ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x)
    (P₃ z₁ y)
· (rmap_e P₁ x z₂ w #⊗ identity (P₂ y x))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w y

E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y z₂ x)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· rmap_e (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) y z₂ w
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w y = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y z₂ x
 · rmap_e (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) y z₂ w)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w y = ?t2

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y z₂ x
 · (identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
    #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P₁ P₂ y z₂ w
    · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
        ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
         ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y w)
    · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y w)))
#⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w y = ?t2

(identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y z₂ x
 · identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P₁ P₂ y z₂ w
 · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
     ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
      ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y w)
 · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)

P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
 #⊗ (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y z₂ x
     · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P₁ P₂ y z₂ w)
 · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
     ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
      ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y w)
 · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)

· comp_enriched_profunctor_in

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V

P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x)
 · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y z₂ x
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P₁ P₂ y z₂ w)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
 · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y w))
#⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w y = ?t2
