P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x)
 · ((comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y z₂ x
     · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P₁ P₂ y z₂ w)
    #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
    · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y w)))
#⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w y = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· ((comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y z₂ x
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P₁ P₂ y z₂ w)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y w))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w y = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· (((comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y z₂ x
     · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P₁ P₂ y z₂ w)
    #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
    · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y w))
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w y) =
?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
((comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y z₂ x
  · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P₁ P₂ y z₂ w)
 #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
 · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y w))
#⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w y = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y z₂ x
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P₁ P₂ y z₂ w)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y w) = ?y'

        apply comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_comm.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_rassociator (P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
     (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
        (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
           (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x) #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
         · ((sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x)
               (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
             · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor P₁ P₂
                 y z₂ w x) #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
            · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
                w y)))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y))
  (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂)
    (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)
    (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
    ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)
· mon_rassociator ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x)
    (P₃ z₁ y)
· (rmap_e P₁ x z₂ w #⊗ identity (P₂ y x))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w y

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_rassociator (P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
     (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
        (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
           (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x) #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
         · ((sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x)
               (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
             · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor P₁ P₂
                 y z₂ w x) #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
            · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
                w y)))) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y))
  (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂)
    (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)
    (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
    ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)
· mon_rassociator ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x)
    (P₃ z₁ y)
· (rmap_e P₁ x z₂ w #⊗ identity (P₂ y x))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w y

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_rassociator (P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
     (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
        (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
           (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x) #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
         · ((sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x)
               (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
             · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor P₁ P₂
                 y z₂ w x) #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
            · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
                w y)))) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_rassociator (P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
     (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
        (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
           (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x) #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
         · ((sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x)
               (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
             · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
                  (P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x)
                · rmap_e P₁ x z₂ w
                  #⊗ identity (P₂ y x)
                · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y
                    w x)) #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
            · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
                w y)))) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_rassociator (P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
     (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
        (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
           (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x) #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x)
              (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
            · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
                 (P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x)
               #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
               · (rmap_e P₁ x z₂ w
                  #⊗ identity (P₂ y x))
                 #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
               · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w
                   x #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y))
            · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁
                w y)))) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_rassociator (P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
    (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x)
    (P₃ z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x) (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· (rmap_e P₁ x z₂ w #⊗ identity (P₂ y x))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w y = ?b

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_rassociator (P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
    (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x)
    (P₃ z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x) (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· (rmap_e P₁ x z₂ w #⊗ identity (P₂ y x))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w y =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y))
  (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂)
    (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)
    (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
    ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)
· mon_rassociator ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x)
    (P₃ z₁ y)
· (rmap_e P₁ x z₂ w #⊗ identity (P₂ y x))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z₁ w y

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_rassociator (P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
    (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x)
    (P₃ z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x) (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y))
  (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂)
    (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)
    (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
    ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)
· mon_rassociator ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x)
    (P₃ z₁ y)

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_rassociator (P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
    (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x)

  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x) (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y))
  (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂)
    (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)
    (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
    ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)
· mon_rassociator ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x)
    (P₃ z₁ y)

#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
    (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x)

· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x) (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y) = ?b

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_rassociator (P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
    (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x)

· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x) (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y) = ?y'

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_rassociator (P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
     (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
        (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
           (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x) #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)
         · sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x)
             (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)))) =
?y'

#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
     (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)

      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_rassociator (P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
     (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
   · mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x)
       (P₃ z₁ y))
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y))
  (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂)
    (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)
    (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
    ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)
· mon_rassociator ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x)
    (P₃ z₁ y)

x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_rassociator (P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
    (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x)
    (P₃ z₁ y)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y))
  (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x)
    (P₃ z₁ y)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y))
  (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂)
    (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)
    (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
    ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)
· mon_rassociator ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x)
    (P₃ z₁ y)

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y))
  (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
   #⊗ mon_rassociator (P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
        (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
      · mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂)
          (P₂ y x) #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y))
  (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂)
     (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)
        (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
           ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)
         · mon_rassociator ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)
             (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
#⊗ mon_rassociator (P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x)
     (P₃ z₁ y)
   · mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x)
     #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y)) =
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂)
  (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· (sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)
     (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
        ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)
      · mon_rassociator ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)
          (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
identity (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄)
#⊗ mon_rassociator (P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z₁ y)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂ ⊗ P₂ y x)
    (P₃ z₁ y)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z₁ y) =
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂)
  (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)
    (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
    ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)
· mon_rassociator ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x)
    (P₃ z₁ y)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂)
  (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· mon_rassociator ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x)
    (P₃ z₁ y) =
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂)
  (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)
    (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
    ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)
· mon_rassociator ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂) (P₂ y x)
    (P₃ z₁ y)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂)
  (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) =
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂)
  (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)
    (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
    ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂)
  (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) =
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂)
  (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· (sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂)
     (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
       ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂)
  (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) =
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂)
  (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)
· identity
    ((E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x z₂ ⊗ (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z₁: C₄
z₂, w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂)
  (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y) =
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ z₂, w ⦄) (P₁ x z₂)
  (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z₁ y)

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  (** ** 1.4. The right associator as a transformation *)

  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃))
  (comp_enriched_profunctor
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃)

  (functor_id_enrichment E₄)
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃))

     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
enriched_profunctor_transformation
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃))
  (comp_enriched_profunctor
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃)

    exact lassociator_enriched_profunctor.
  Defined.

  (** * 2. The right associator *)

  (** ** 2.1. Action on objects *)
  Definition rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob
             (z : C₄)
             (y : C₃)
             (x : C₂)
             (w : C₁)
    : P₁ x w ⊗ P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z y
      -->
      comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w
    := mon_lassociator _ _ _
       · (identity _ #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x y)
       · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w x.

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁)
· internal_lam
    (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y x₁ w) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
#⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
· identity (P₁ x₂ w) #⊗ rmap_e P₂ y x₁ x₂
· internal_lam
    (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y x₂ w)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁)
· internal_lam
    (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y x₁ w) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
#⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
· identity (P₁ x₂ w) #⊗ rmap_e P₂ y x₁ x₂
· internal_lam
    (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y x₂ w)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧),
(lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁)
 · internal_lam
     (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y x₁ w))
#⊗ h
· internal_eval (P₃ z y)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w) =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
 #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁)
 · mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
 · identity (P₁ x₂ w) #⊗ rmap_e P₂ y x₁ x₂
 · internal_lam
     (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y x₂ w))
#⊗ h
· internal_eval (P₃ z y)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
(lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁)
 · internal_lam
     (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y x₁ w))
#⊗ h
· internal_eval (P₃ z y)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w) =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
 #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁)
 · mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
 · identity (P₁ x₂ w) #⊗ rmap_e P₂ y x₁ x₂
 · internal_lam
     (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y x₂ w))
#⊗ h
· internal_eval (P₃ z y)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
(lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁)) #⊗ h
· internal_lam
    (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y x₁ w)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· internal_eval (P₃ z y)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w) =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
 #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁)) #⊗ h
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· (identity (P₁ x₂ w) #⊗ rmap_e P₂ y x₁ x₂)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· internal_lam
    (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y x₂ w)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· internal_eval (P₃ z y)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
(lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁)) #⊗ h
· (internal_lam
     (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y x₁ w)
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
   · internal_eval (P₃ z y)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w)) =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
 #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
   · ((identity (P₁ x₂ w) #⊗ rmap_e P₂ y x₁ x₂)
      #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
      · (internal_lam
           (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y
              x₂ w) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
         · internal_eval (P₃ z y)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w))))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
(lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁)) #⊗ h
· rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y x₁ w =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
 #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
   · ((identity (P₁ x₂ w) #⊗ rmap_e P₂ y x₁ x₂)
      #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
      · rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y x₂
          w))

z: C₄
y: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⊗ P₂ y x₁) #⊗ h
· (lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y x₁ w =
identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⊗ P₂ y x₁) #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
   #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁)) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· (mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
   · ((identity (P₁ x₂ w) #⊗ rmap_e P₂ y x₁ x₂)
      #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
      · rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y x₂
          w))

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⊗ P₂ y x₁) #⊗ h
· ((lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁))
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
   · rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y x₁ w) =
identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w ⊗ P₂ y x₁) #⊗ h
· ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
    #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁)) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
   · (mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (P₂ y x₁) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
      · ((identity (P₁ x₂ w) #⊗ rmap_e P₂ y x₁ x₂)
         #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
         · rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y
             x₂ w)))

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
(lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁))
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· (mon_lassociator (P₁ x₁ w) (P₂ y x₁) (P₃ z y)
   · identity (P₁ x₁ w)
     #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₁ y
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w x₁) =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
 #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁)) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· (mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
   · ((identity (P₁ x₂ w) #⊗ rmap_e P₂ y x₁ x₂)
      #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
      · (mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ y x₂) (P₃ z y)
         · identity (P₁ x₂ w)
           #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₂ y
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w x₂)))

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
(lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁))
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₁ w) (P₂ y x₁) (P₃ z y)
· identity (P₁ x₁ w)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₁ y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w x₁ =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
 #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁)) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· (identity (P₁ x₂ w) #⊗ rmap_e P₂ y x₁ x₂)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ y x₂) (P₃ z y)
· identity (P₁ x₂ w)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₂ y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w x₂

w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
(lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁))
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₁ w) (P₂ y x₁) (P₃ z y)
· identity (P₁ x₁ w)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₁ y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w x₁ = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category

w: C₁
a: V

?b =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
 #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁)) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· (identity (P₁ x₂ w) #⊗ rmap_e P₂ y x₁ x₂)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ y x₂) (P₃ z y)
· identity (P₁ x₂ w)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₂ y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w x₂

#⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x₁)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
mon_lassociator ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ y x₁)
  (P₃ z y)
· (identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₁ y
   · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z x₁)
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
          (P₁ x₂ w
           ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z x₁)
      · mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z x₁)
          (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      · identity (P₁ x₂ w)
        #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z x₁)
              (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            · rmap_e (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)
                z x₁ x₂)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w x₂)) =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
 #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁)) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· (identity (P₁ x₂ w) #⊗ rmap_e P₂ y x₁ x₂)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ y x₂) (P₃ z y)
· identity (P₁ x₂ w)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₂ y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w x₂

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
mon_lassociator ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ y x₁)
  (P₃ z y)
· (identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₁ y
   · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z x₁)
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
          (P₁ x₂ w
           ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z x₁)
      · mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z x₁)
          (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      · identity (P₁ x₂ w)
        #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z x₁)
              (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            · rmap_e (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)
                z x₁ x₂)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w x₂)) =
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
?b =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
 #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁)) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· (identity (P₁ x₂ w) #⊗ rmap_e P₂ y x₁ x₂)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ y x₂) (P₃ z y)
· identity (P₁ x₂ w)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₂ y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w x₂

   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁

      · rmap_e (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z x₁
          x₂)

    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w x₂ = ?t2

· identity (P₁ x₂ w)
  #⊗ (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₁ y

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
identity (P₁ x₂ w)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
· identity (P₁ x₂ w)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
        (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor P₂ P₃ z x₁
          x₂ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w x₂ = ?t2

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
identity (P₁ x₂ w)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
    · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
         (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
       · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor P₂ P₃ z x₁
           x₂ y))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w x₂ = ?t2

#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
    · sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
        (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)

        y)

y: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
identity (P₁ x₂ w)
#⊗ (identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y))
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor P₂ P₃ z x₁ x₂

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
identity (P₁ x₂ w)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor P₂ P₃ z x₁ x₂ y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w x₂ = ?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
identity (P₁ x₂ w)
#⊗ (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁) (P₃ z y)
    · rmap_e P₂ y x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₂ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w x₂ = ?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
identity (P₁ x₂ w)
#⊗ mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁) (P₃ z y)
· identity (P₁ x₂ w)
  #⊗ (rmap_e P₂ y x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (P₃ z y))
· identity (P₁ x₂ w)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₂ y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w x₂ = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
mon_lassociator ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ y x₁)
  (P₃ z y)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
     (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (P₁ x₂ w ⊗ (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y))
      · (mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
           (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         · (identity (P₁ x₂ w)
            #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
                 (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            · (identity (P₁ x₂ w)
               #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                    (P₂ y x₁) (P₃ z y)
               · identity (P₁ x₂ w)
                 #⊗ (rmap_e P₂ y x₁ x₂
                     #⊗ identity (P₃ z y))
               · identity (P₁ x₂ w)
                 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃
                      z x₂ y
               · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z
                   w x₂))))) =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
 #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁)) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· (identity (P₁ x₂ w) #⊗ rmap_e P₂ y x₁ x₂)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ y x₂) (P₃ z y)
· identity (P₁ x₂ w)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₂ y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w x₂

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
mon_lassociator ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ y x₁)
  (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
    (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P₁ x₂ w ⊗ (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y))
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x₂ w)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
       (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x₂ w)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
       (P₃ z y)
· identity (P₁ x₂ w)
  #⊗ (rmap_e P₂ y x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (P₃ z y))
· identity (P₁ x₂ w)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₂ y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w x₂ =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
 #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁)) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· (identity (P₁ x₂ w) #⊗ rmap_e P₂ y x₁ x₂)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ y x₂) (P₃ z y)
· identity (P₁ x₂ w)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x₂ y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w x₂

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
mon_lassociator ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ y x₁)
  (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
    (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P₁ x₂ w ⊗ (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y))
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x₂ w)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
       (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x₂ w)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
       (P₃ z y)
· identity (P₁ x₂ w)
  #⊗ (rmap_e P₂ y x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)) =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
 #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁)) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· (identity (P₁ x₂ w) #⊗ rmap_e P₂ y x₁ x₂)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ y x₂) (P₃ z y)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
mon_lassociator ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ y x₁)
  (P₃ z y)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
     (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (P₁ x₂ w ⊗ (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y))
      · (mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
           (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         · (identity (P₁ x₂ w)
            #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
                 (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            · (identity (P₁ x₂ w)
               #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                    (P₂ y x₁) (P₃ z y)
               · identity (P₁ x₂ w)
                 #⊗ (rmap_e P₂ y x₁ x₂
                     #⊗ identity (P₃ z y))))))) =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
 #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁)) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· (mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
   · ((identity (P₁ x₂ w) #⊗ rmap_e P₂ y x₁ x₂)
      #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
      · mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ y x₂) (P₃ z y)))

P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
mon_lassociator ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ y x₁)
  (P₃ z y)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
     (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (P₁ x₂ w ⊗ (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y))
      · (mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
           (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         · (identity (P₁ x₂ w)
            #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
                 (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            · (identity (P₁ x₂ w)
               #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                    (P₂ y x₁) (P₃ z y)
               · identity (P₁ x₂ w)
                 #⊗ (rmap_e P₂ y x₁ x₂
                     #⊗ identity (P₃ z y))))))) =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
 #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁)) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· (mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
   · (mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w)
        ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y x₁) (P₃ z y)
      · identity (P₁ x₂ w)
        #⊗ (rmap_e P₂ y x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (P₃ z y))))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
mon_lassociator ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ y x₁)
  (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
    (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P₁ x₂ w ⊗ (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y))
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x₂ w)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
       (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x₂ w)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
       (P₃ z y)
· identity (P₁ x₂ w)
  #⊗ (rmap_e P₂ y x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)) =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
 #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁)) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y x₁) (P₃ z y)
· identity (P₁ x₂ w)
  #⊗ (rmap_e P₂ y x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (P₃ z y))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
mon_lassociator ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ y x₁)
  (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
    (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P₁ x₂ w ⊗ (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y))
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x₂ w)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
       (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x₂ w)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
       (P₃ z y) =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
 #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁)) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y x₁) (P₃ z y)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
mon_lassociator ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ y x₁)
  (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
    (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P₁ x₂ w ⊗ (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y))
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x₂ w)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
       (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x₂ w)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
       (P₃ z y) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
?b =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
 #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁)) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y x₁) (P₃ z y)

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
mon_lassociator ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ y x₁)
  (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
    (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P₁ x₂ w ⊗ (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y))
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x₂ w)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
       (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x₂ w)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
       (P₃ z y) = ?b

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
mon_lassociator ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ y x₁)
  (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
    (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P₁ x₂ w ⊗ (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y))
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) = ?y'

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
mon_lassociator ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ y x₁)
  (P₃ z y)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
     (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (P₁ x₂ w ⊗ (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y))
      · mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
          (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))) = ?y'

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
  (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     (P₁ x₂ w ⊗ (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y))
   · mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
       (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)) = ?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
  (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P₁ x₂ w ⊗ (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y))
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) = ?t2

      apply sym_mon_hexagon_lassociator.
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
mon_lassociator ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ y x₁)
  (P₃ z y)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
   #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
   · mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
       (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
   · identity (P₁ x₂ w)
     #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
          (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y))
· identity (P₁ x₂ w)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
       (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x₂ w)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
       (P₃ z y) =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
 #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁)) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y x₁) (P₃ z y)

  (P₃ z y)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
   #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
   · mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)

  #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)

  (P₃ z y)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)

E₁: enrichment C₁ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
mon_lassociator ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ y x₁)
  (P₃ z y)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
   #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
   · mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
       (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
   · identity (P₁ x₂ w)
     #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
          (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y))
· identity (P₁ x₂ w)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
       (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) = ?y'

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
mon_lassociator ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ y x₁)
  (P₃ z y)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
   #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
   · (mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
      · (identity (P₁ x₂ w)
         #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
              (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
         · identity (P₁ x₂ w)
           #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
                (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)))) = ?y'

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
mon_lassociator ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ y x₁)
  (P₃ z y)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
   #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
   · (mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
      · identity (P₁ x₂ w)
        #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
              (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
            · sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
                (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)))) = ?y'

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
mon_lassociator ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ y x₁)
  (P₃ z y)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
   #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
   · (mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
      · identity (P₁ x₂ w)
        #⊗ identity
             ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)))) =
?y'

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
mon_lassociator ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ y x₁)
  (P₃ z y)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
   #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
   · (mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
      · identity
          (P₁ x₂ w
           ⊗ ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y))))) =
?y'

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄

w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
mon_lassociator ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ y x₁)
  (P₃ z y)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
   #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
   · mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
       (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)) = ?y'

      apply idpath.
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
mon_lassociator ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ y x₁)
  (P₃ z y)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
   #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
   · mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
       (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y))
· identity (P₁ x₂ w)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
       (P₃ z y) =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
 #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁)) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y x₁) (P₃ z y)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
mon_lassociator ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₁ x₂ w) (P₂ y x₁)
  (P₃ z y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
  #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
· identity (P₁ x₂ w)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
       (P₃ z y) =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
 #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁)) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y x₁) (P₃ z y)

  (P₃ z y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
  #⊗ (identity (P₂ y x₁) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y))
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)

 #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁)) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y x₁) (P₃ z y)

(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
 #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁)) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
    (P₂ y x₁) (P₃ z y)

 #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁)) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)

y: C₃

w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
 #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁)) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· (mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
     (P₂ y x₁) (P₃ z y)
   · (mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)
      · identity (P₁ x₂ w)

 #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁)) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· (mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
   · mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w)
       ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y x₁) (P₃ z y))

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧

  (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)

       (P₃ z y) =

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y x₁) (P₃ z y)
· identity (P₁ x₂ w)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
       (P₃ z y)
· identity (P₁ x₂ w)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
       (P₃ z y) =
mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y x₁) (P₃ z y)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· (mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w)
     ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y x₁) (P₃ z y)
   · (identity (P₁ x₂ w)
      #⊗ mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
           (P₃ z y)
      · identity (P₁ x₂ w)
        #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
             (P₃ z y))) =
mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y x₁) (P₃ z y)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· (mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w)
     ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y x₁) (P₃ z y)
   · identity (P₁ x₂ w)
     #⊗ (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
           (P₃ z y)
         · mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
             (P₃ z y))) =
mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y x₁) (P₃ z y)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· (mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w)
     ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y x₁) (P₃ z y)
   · identity (P₁ x₂ w)
     #⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y)) =
mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y x₁) (P₃ z y)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· (mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w)
     ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y x₁) (P₃ z y)
   · identity
       (P₁ x₂ w ⊗ ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y x₁ ⊗ P₃ z y))) =
mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y x₁) (P₃ z y)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
w: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y ⟧
mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y x₁) (P₃ z y) =
mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y x₁) (P₃ z y)

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  (** ** 2.2. The data *)
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
w: C₁
V ⟦ comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y w,
P₃ z y
⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w ⟧

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
w: C₁
V ⟦ comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y w,
P₃ z y
⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w ⟧

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
w: C₁
∏ y0 : C₂,
V ⟦ P₁ y0 w ⊗ P₂ y y0,
P₃ z y
⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w ⟧
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
w: C₁
∏ y₁ y₂ : C₂,
lmap_e P₁ y₂ y₁ w #⊗ identity (P₂ y y₁) · ?fs y₁ =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₁ y₂ w)
#⊗ identity (P₂ y y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ y₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y y₁)
· identity (P₁ y₂ w) #⊗ rmap_e P₂ y y₁ y₂ · ?fs y₂

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
w: C₁
∏ y0 : C₂,
V ⟦ P₁ y0 w ⊗ P₂ y y0,
P₃ z y
⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w ⟧
 exact (λ x, internal_lam (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y x w)).
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
w: C₁
∏ y₁ y₂ : C₂,
lmap_e P₁ y₂ y₁ w #⊗ identity (P₂ y y₁)
· (λ x : C₂,
   internal_lam
     (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y x w))
    y₁ =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₁ y₂ w)
#⊗ identity (P₂ y y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ y₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y y₁)
· identity (P₁ y₂ w) #⊗ rmap_e P₂ y y₁ y₂
· (λ x : C₂,
   internal_lam
     (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y x w))
    y₂
 
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
w: C₁
x₁, x₂: C₂
lmap_e P₁ x₂ x₁ w #⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁)
· internal_lam
    (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y x₁ w) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₁ x₂ w)
#⊗ identity (P₂ y x₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x₂ w) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P₂ y x₁)
· identity (P₁ x₂ w) #⊗ rmap_e P₂ y x₁ x₂
· internal_lam
    (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y x₂ w)

      exact (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_eq z y x₁ x₂ w).
  Defined.

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
 · rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y w)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· internal_eval (P₃ z y)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w) =
rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y x w
