C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
 · rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y w)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· internal_eval (P₃ z y)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w) =
rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y x w

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
 · from_comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y w
     (λ x : C₂,
      internal_lam
        (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y x
           w))
     (λ x₁ x₂ : C₂,
      rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_eq z y x₁ x₂
        w)) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· internal_eval (P₃ z y)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w) =
rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y x w

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
internal_lam
  (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y x w)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· internal_eval (P₃ z y)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w) =
rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y x w

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y x w =
rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y x w

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
(identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁ P₂ y₂ y₁ w
 · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w)
 · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w))
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₁ w
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
   · internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
  #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
· (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₂ w
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
   · internal_eval (P₃ z y₂)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
(identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁ P₂ y₂ y₁ w
 · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w)
 · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w))
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₁ w
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
   · internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
  #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
· (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₂ w
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
   · internal_eval (P₃ z y₂)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
internal_lam
  ((identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁ P₂ y₂ y₁ w
    · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w)
    · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w))
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
   · (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₁ w
      #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
      · internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w))) =
internal_lam
  (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
   · mon_lassociator
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
       (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
   · identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
     #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
   · (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₂ w
      #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
      · internal_eval (P₃ z y₂)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w)))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
internal_transpose
  (internal_lam
     ((identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁ P₂ y₂ y₁ w
       · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w)
       · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w))
      #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
      · (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₁ w
         #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
         · internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w)))) =
internal_transpose
  (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
      #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
      · mon_lassociator
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
          (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
      · identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
        #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
      · (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₂ w
         #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
         · internal_eval (P₃ z y₂)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w))))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
internal_lam
  (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
     (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · internal_lam
       ((identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁ P₂ y₂ y₁
              w
         · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
             ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
              ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w)
         · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w))
        #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
        · (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₁ w
           #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
           · internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w)))) =
internal_lam
  (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
     (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · internal_lam
       (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
        #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
        · mon_lassociator
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
            (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
        · identity
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
          #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
        · (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₂ w
           #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
           · internal_eval (P₃ z y₂)
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w))))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
∏ y : C₂,
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w y
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
       (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     · internal_lam
         ((identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁ P₂ y₂
                y₁ w
           · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
               ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁
                    w)
           · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
               (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w))
          #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
          · (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₁
               w #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
             · internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z
                    w)))) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w y
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
       (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     · internal_lam
         (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
          #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
          · mon_lassociator
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
              (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
          · identity
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
            #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
          · (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₂
               w #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
             · internal_eval (P₃ z y₂)
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z
                    w))))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x'
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
       (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     · internal_lam
         ((identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁ P₂ y₂
                y₁ w
           · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
               ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁
                    w)
           · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
               (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w))
          #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
          · (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₁
               w #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
             · internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z
                    w)))) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x'
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
       (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     · internal_lam
         (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
          #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
          · mon_lassociator
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
              (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
          · identity
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
            #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
          · (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₂
               w #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
             · internal_eval (P₃ z y₂)
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z
                    w))))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧),
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x'
 · internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
        (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · internal_lam
          ((identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁ P₂ y₂
                 y₁ w
            · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                 ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂
                     y₁ w)
            · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁
                   w)) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
           · (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₁
                w #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
              · internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
                  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)
                     z w))))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P₃ z y₁
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w) =
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x'
 · internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
        (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · internal_lam
          (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
           #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
           · mon_lassociator
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
               (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
           · identity
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
             #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
           · (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₂
                w #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
              · internal_eval (P₃ z y₂)
                  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)
                     z w))))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P₃ z y₁
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x'
 · internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
        (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · internal_lam
          ((identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁ P₂ y₂
                 y₁ w
            · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                 ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂
                     y₁ w)
            · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁
                   w)) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
           · (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₁
                w #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
              · internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
                  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)
                     z w))))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P₃ z y₁
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w) =
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x'
 · internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
        (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · internal_lam
          (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
           #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
           · mon_lassociator
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
               (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
           · identity
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
             #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
           · (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₂
                w #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
              · internal_eval (P₃ z y₂)
                  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)
                     z w))))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P₃ z y₁
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x' #⊗ h
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
       (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     · internal_lam
         ((identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁ P₂ y₂
                y₁ w) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
          · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
              ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
               ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁
                   w) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
          · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w)
            #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
          · (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₁
               w #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
             · internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z
                    w)))) #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P₃ z y₁
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x' #⊗ h
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
       (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     · internal_lam
         (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
          #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
          · mon_lassociator
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
              (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
          · identity
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
            #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
          · (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₂
               w #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
             · internal_eval (P₃ z y₂)
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z
                    w)))) #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P₃ z y₁
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
identity (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') #⊗ h
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x'
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
       (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     · internal_lam
         ((identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁ P₂ y₂
                y₁ w) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
          · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
              ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
               ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁
                   w) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
          · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w)
            #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
          · (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₁
               w #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
             · internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z
                    w)))) #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P₃ z y₁
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w) =
identity (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') #⊗ h
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x'
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
       (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     · internal_lam
         (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
          #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
          · mon_lassociator
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
              (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
          · identity
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
            #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
          · (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₂
               w #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
             · internal_eval (P₃ z y₂)
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z
                    w)))) #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P₃ z y₁
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
identity (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') #⊗ h
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x'
   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · (internal_lam
        (sym_mon_braiding V
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
           (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         · internal_lam
             ((identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
               #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁ P₂
                    y₂ y₁ w) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
              · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                   ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                    ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
                        P₂ y₁ w) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
                 · (internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
                         P₂ y₁ w)
                    #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
                    · (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor
                         z y₁ w #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
                       · internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
                           (comp_enriched_profunctor
                              P₁
                              (comp_enriched_profunctor
                                 P₂ P₃) z w))))))
      #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
          (P₃ z y₁
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w))) =
identity (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') #⊗ h
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x'
   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · (internal_lam
        (sym_mon_braiding V
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
           (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         · internal_lam
             (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
              #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
              · (mon_lassociator
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂
                      w) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
                 · (identity
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂
                         y₂ w) #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
                    · (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor
                         z y₂ w #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
                       · internal_eval (P₃ z y₂)
                           (comp_enriched_profunctor
                              P₁
                              (comp_enriched_profunctor
                                 P₂ P₃) z w))))))
      #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
          (P₃ z y₁
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w)))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x'
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
        (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · internal_lam
          ((identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁ P₂ y₂
                 y₁ w) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
           · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                 ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂
                     y₁ w) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
              · (internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂
                      y₁ w) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
                 · (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor
                      z y₁ w #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
                    · internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
                        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                           (comp_enriched_profunctor
                              P₂ P₃) z w))))))
   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       (P₃ z y₁
        ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w)) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x'
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
        (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · internal_lam
          (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
           #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
           · (mon_lassociator
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
                (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
              · (identity
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂
                      w) #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
                 · (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor
                      z y₂ w #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
                    · internal_eval (P₃ z y₂)
                        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                           (comp_enriched_profunctor
                              P₂ P₃) z w))))))
   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       (P₃ z y₁
        ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x'
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
     (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · internal_lam
       ((identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁ P₂ y₂ y₁
              w) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
        · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
             ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
              ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w)
           #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
           · (internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁
                   w) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
              · (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z
                   y₁ w #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
                 · internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
                     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂
                           P₃) z w)))))) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x'
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
     (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · internal_lam
       (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
        #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
        · (mon_lassociator
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
             (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
           · (identity
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
              #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
              · (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z
                   y₂ w #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
                 · internal_eval (P₃ z y₂)
                     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂
                           P₃) z w))))))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x'
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· internal_lam
    ((identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁ P₂ y₂ y₁ w)
     #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
     · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
          ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w)
       #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
     · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w)
       #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
     · rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₁ w
       #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
     · internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w)) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x'
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
     #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
     · mon_lassociator
         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
         (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
     · identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
       #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
     · rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₂ w
       #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
     · internal_eval (P₃ z y₂)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x')
  (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x'
· internal_lam
    ((identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁ P₂ y₂ y₁ w)
     #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
     · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
          ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w)
       #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
     · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w)
       #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
     · rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₁ w
       #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
     · internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x')
  (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x'
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
     #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
     · mon_lassociator
         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
         (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
     · identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
       #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
     · rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₂ w
       #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
     · internal_eval (P₃ z y₂)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x')
  (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· (identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x'
   · internal_lam
       ((identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁ P₂ y₂ y₁
              w) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
        · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
             ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
              ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w)
           #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
           · (internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁
                   w) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
              · (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z
                   y₁ w #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
                 · internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
                     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂
                           P₃) z w)))))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x')
  (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· (identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x'
   · internal_lam
       (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
        #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
        · (mon_lassociator
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
             (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
           · (identity
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
              #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
              · (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z
                   y₂ w #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
                 · internal_eval (P₃ z y₂)
                     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂
                           P₃) z w))))))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x'
· internal_lam
    ((identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁ P₂ y₂ y₁ w)
     #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
     · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
          ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w)
        #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
        · (internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w)
           #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
           · (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₁
                w #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
              · internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
                  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)
                     z w))))) =
identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x'
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
     #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
     · (mon_lassociator
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
          (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
        · (identity
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
           #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
           · (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₂
                w #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
              · internal_eval (P₃ z y₂)
                  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)
                     z w)))))

y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x'
· internal_lam
    ((identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁ P₂ y₂ y₁ w)
     #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
     · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
          ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w)
        #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
        · (internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w)
           #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
           · (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₁
                w #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
              · internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
                  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)
                     z w))))) =
identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x'
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
     #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
     · (mon_lassociator
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
          (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
        · (identity
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
           #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
           · (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₂
                w #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
              · internal_eval (P₃ z y₂)
                  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)
                     z w)))))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, P₃ z y₁ ⟧),
(identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x'
 · internal_lam
     ((identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁ P₂ y₂ y₁ w)
      #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w)
         #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
         · (internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w)
            #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
            · (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z
                 y₁ w #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
               · internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)
                      z w)))))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w) =
(identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x'
 · internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
      #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
      · (mon_lassociator
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
           (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
         · (identity
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
            #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
            · (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z
                 y₂ w #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
               · internal_eval (P₃ z y₂)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)
                      z w)))))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w)

                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)
                      z w)))))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w) =
(identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x'
 · internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)

                      z w)))))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w)

E₁: enrichment C₁ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y₁ ⟧
(identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x') #⊗ h
· internal_lam
    ((identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁ P₂ y₂ y₁ w)
     #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
     · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
          ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w)
        #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
        · (internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w)
           #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
           · (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₁
                w #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
              · internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
                  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)
                     z w))))) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w) =
(identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x') #⊗ h
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
     #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
     · (mon_lassociator
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
          (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
        · (identity
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
           #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
           · (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₂
                w #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
              · internal_eval (P₃ z y₂)
                  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)
                     z w))))) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y₁ ⟧
identity ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x')) #⊗ h
· (identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x')
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· internal_lam
    ((identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁ P₂ y₂ y₁ w)
     #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
     · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
          ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w)
        #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
        · (internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w)
           #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
           · (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₁
                w #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
              · internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
                  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)
                     z w))))) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w) =
identity ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x')) #⊗ h
· (identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x')
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
     #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
     · (mon_lassociator
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
          (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
        · (identity
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
           #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
           · (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₂
                w #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
              · internal_eval (P₃ z y₂)
                  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)
                     z w))))) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y₁ ⟧
identity ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x')) #⊗ h
· ((identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x')
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
   · (internal_lam
        ((identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
          #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁ P₂ y₂ y₁
               w) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
              ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
               ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁
                   w) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
            · (internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁
                    w) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
               · (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor
                    z y₁ w #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
                  · internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂
                            P₃) z w)))))
      #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
      · internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w))) =
identity ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x')) #⊗ h
· ((identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x')
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
   · (internal_lam
        (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
         #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
         · (mon_lassociator
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
              (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
            · (identity
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
               #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
               · (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor
                    z y₂ w #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
                  · internal_eval (P₃ z y₂)
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂
                            P₃) z w)))))
      #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
      · internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w)))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z y₁ ⟧
(identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x')
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· (internal_lam
     ((identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁ P₂ y₂ y₁ w)
      #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w)
         #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
         · (internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w)
            #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
            · (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z
                 y₁ w #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
               · internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)
                      z w))))) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
   · internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w)) =
(identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x')
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
      #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
      · (mon_lassociator
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
           (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
         · (identity
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
            #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
            · (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z
                 y₂ w #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
               · internal_eval (P₃ z y₂)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)
                      z w))))) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
   · internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
(identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x')
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· (internal_lam
     ((identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁ P₂ y₂ y₁ w)
      #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w)
         #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
         · (internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w)
            #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
            · (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z
                 y₁ w #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
               · internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)
                      z w))))) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
   · internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w)) =
(identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x')
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
      #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
      · (mon_lassociator
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
           (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
         · (identity
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
            #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
            · (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z
                 y₂ w #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
               · internal_eval (P₃ z y₂)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)
                      z w))))) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
   · internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
(identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x')
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· ((identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁ P₂ y₂ y₁ w)
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w)
      #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
      · (internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w)
         #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
         · (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₁ w
            #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
            · internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z
                   w))))) =
(identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x')
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
   · (mon_lassociator
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
        (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
      · (identity
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
         #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
         · (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₂ w
            #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
            · internal_eval (P₃ z y₂)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z
                   w)))))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
(identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x')
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁ P₂ y₂ y₁ w)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₁ w
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w) =
(identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x')
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
  #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
· rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₂ w
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
· internal_eval (P₃ z y₂)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
(identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x'
 · identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁ P₂ y₂ y₁ w
 · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w)
 · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w)
 · rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₁ w)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w) =
(identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x'
 · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w))
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
  #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
· rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₂ w
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
· internal_eval (P₃ z y₂)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
(identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x'
 · identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁ P₂ y₂ y₁ w
 · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w)
 · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w)
 · rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₁ w)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
?b =
(identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x'
 · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w))
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
  #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
· rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₂ w
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
· internal_eval (P₃ z y₂)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
(identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x'
 · identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁ P₂ y₂ y₁ w
 · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w)
 · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w)
 · rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₁ w)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w) = ?b

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x'
· identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁ P₂ y₂ y₁ w
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w) = ?y'

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x'
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁ P₂ y₂ y₁ w)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w) = ?y'

P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄

w: C₁
x': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x')
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x'
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁ P₂ y₂ y₁ w)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w) = ?y'

x': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x')
· ((comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x'
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁ P₂ y₂ y₁ w)
   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)

P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄

w: C₁
x': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x')
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x')
     (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor P₁ P₂ y₂ y₁ w
       x') = ?y'

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x')
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x')
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor P₁ P₂ y₂ y₁ w x' =
?y'

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
identity ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x'))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor P₁ P₂ y₂ y₁ w x' =
?y'

      apply id_left.
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
(comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor P₁ P₂ y₂ y₁ w x'
 · rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₁ w)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w) =
(identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x'
 · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w))
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
  #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
· rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₂ w
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
· internal_eval (P₃ z y₂)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x')
 · mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₂ x')
     (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
 · identity (P₁ x' w)
   #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       · lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x')
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₁ w x'
 · rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₁ w)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w) =
(identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x'
 · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w))
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
  #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
· rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₂ w
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
· internal_eval (P₃ z y₂)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w)

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x')
 · mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₂ x')
     (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
 · identity (P₁ x' w)
   #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       · lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x')
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₁ w x'
 · rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₁ w)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
?b =
(identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x'
 · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w))
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
  #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
· rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₂ w
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
· internal_eval (P₃ z y₂)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w)

 · mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₂ x')
     (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)

   #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       · lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x')

 · (mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₂ x')

       #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x')

  (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· (mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₂ x')

· internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)

       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w) = ?b

· (mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₂ x')

   · ((identity (P₁ x' w)

      #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)

         #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
         · internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)

  (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· (mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₂ x')
     (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
   · ((identity (P₁ x' w)
       #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x')
             (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) · lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x'))
      #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
      · rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y₁ x'
          w)) = ?b

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· (mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₂ x')
     (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
   · ((identity (P₁ x' w)
       #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x')
             (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) · lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x'))
      #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
      · (mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₁ x')
           (P₃ z y₁)
         · identity (P₁ x' w)
           #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x'
                y₁
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w x'))) =
?b

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (P₁ x' w)
   #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       · lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x')) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₁ x') (P₃ z y₁)
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x' y₁
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w x' = ?b

      apply idpath.
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (P₁ x' w)
   #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       · lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x')) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₁ x') (P₃ z y₁)
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x' y₁
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w x' =
(identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x'
 · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w))
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
  #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
· rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₂ w
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
· internal_eval (P₃ z y₂)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
(identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x'
 · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w))
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
  #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
· rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₂ w
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
· internal_eval (P₃ z y₂)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (P₁ x' w)
   #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       · lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x')) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₁ x') (P₃ z y₁)
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x' y₁
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w x'

 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x'

· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x' y₁
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁

#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
· rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₂ w
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
· internal_eval (P₃ z y₂)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w) = ?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y₂ w x'
 · rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₂ w)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
· internal_eval (P₃ z y₂)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w) = ?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y₂ x' w = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· (mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x')
     (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
   · (identity (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x')
      #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
      · rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y₂ x'
          w)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (P₁ x' w)
   #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       · lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x')) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₁ x') (P₃ z y₁)
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x' y₁
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w x'

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· (mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x')
     (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
   · (identity (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x')
      #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
      · (mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₂ x')
           (P₃ z y₂)
         · identity (P₁ x' w)
           #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x'
                y₂
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w x'))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (P₁ x' w)
   #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       · lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x')) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₁ x') (P₃ z y₁)
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x' y₁
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w x'

w: C₁
x': C₂

w: C₁
x': C₂

  ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
· identity (P₁ x' w)

      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
      · mon_rassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (P₃ z y₁)
          (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x' ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
          (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · mon_rassociator (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x')

w: C₁
x': C₂
mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₂ x')
  ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (P₁ x' w)
   #⊗ (identity (P₂ y₂ x')
       #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁))
   · identity (P₁ x' w)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (P₃ z y₁)

          (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · identity (P₁ x' w)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x')
          (P₃ z y₁)
   · identity (P₁ x' w)
     #⊗ (lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x' #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))
   · identity (P₁ x' w)
     #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x' y₁) =
?t2

w: C₁
x': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· (mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x')
     (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
   · (mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₂ x')
        ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
      · (identity (P₁ x' w)
         #⊗ (identity (P₂ y₂ x')
             #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                  (P₃ z y₁))
         · identity (P₁ x' w)
           #⊗ mon_rassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (P₃ z y₁)
                (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         · identity (P₁ x' w)
           #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x' ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
                (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         · identity (P₁ x' w)
           #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                (P₂ y₂ x') (P₃ z y₁)
         · identity (P₁ x' w)
           #⊗ (lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x'
               #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))
         · identity (P₁ x' w)
           #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x'
                y₁))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (P₁ x' w)
   #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       · lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x')) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₁ x') (P₃ z y₁)
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x' y₁

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₂ x')
    ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ (identity (P₂ y₂ x')
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁))
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (P₃ z y₁)
       (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x' ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
       (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x')
       (P₃ z y₁)
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ (lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x' #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x' y₁ =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (P₁ x' w)
   #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       · lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x')) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₁ x') (P₃ z y₁)
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x' y₁

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₂ x')
    ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ (identity (P₂ y₂ x')
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁))
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (P₃ z y₁)
       (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x' ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
       (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x')
       (P₃ z y₁)
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ (lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x' #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (P₁ x' w)
   #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       · lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x')) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₁ x') (P₃ z y₁)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (P₁ x' w)
   #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       · lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x')) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₁ x') (P₃ z y₁) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₂ x')
    ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ (identity (P₂ y₂ x')
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁))
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (P₃ z y₁)
       (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x' ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
       (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x')
       (P₃ z y₁)
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ (lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x' #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (P₁ x' w)
   #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       · lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x')) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₁ x') (P₃ z y₁) = 
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₂ x')
    ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ (identity (P₂ y₂ x')
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁))
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (P₃ z y₁)
       (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x' ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
       (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x')
       (P₃ z y₁)
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ (lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x' #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄

w: C₁
x': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (P₁ x' w)
   #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       · lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x')) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₁ x') (P₃ z y₁) = 
?b

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· (mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₂ x')
     (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
   · ((identity (P₁ x' w)
       #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x')
             (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) · lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x'))
      #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
      · mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₁ x') (P₃ z y₁))) =
?b

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
(identity (P₁ x' w)
 #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     · lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x')) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₁ x') (P₃ z y₁) = 
?t2

w: C₁
x': C₂
(identity (P₁ x' w)
 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
 · identity (P₁ x' w) #⊗ lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x')
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₁ x') (P₃ z y₁) = 
?t2
