(identity (P₁ x' w)
 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (P₁ x' w) #⊗ lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x')

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
(identity (P₁ x' w)
 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· ((identity (P₁ x' w) #⊗ lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x')
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
   · mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₁ x') (P₃ z y₁)) =

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
(identity (P₁ x' w)
 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· (mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w)
     ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') (P₃ z y₁)
   · identity (P₁ x' w)
     #⊗ (lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x' #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))) =
?t2

      apply idpath.
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· (mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₂ x')
     (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
   · ((identity (P₁ x' w)
       #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x')
            (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
      · (mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w)
           ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') (P₃ z y₁)
         · identity (P₁ x' w)
           #⊗ (lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x'
               #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₂ x')
    ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ (identity (P₂ y₂ x')
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁))
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (P₃ z y₁)
       (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x' ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
       (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x')
       (P₃ z y₁)
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ (lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x' #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (P₁ x' w)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w)
    ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') (P₃ z y₁)
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ (lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x' #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₂ x')
    ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ (identity (P₂ y₂ x')
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁))
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (P₃ z y₁)
       (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x' ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
       (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x')
       (P₃ z y₁)
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ (lmap_e P₂ y₂ y₁ x' #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (P₁ x' w)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w)
    ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') (P₃ z y₁) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₂ x')
    ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ (identity (P₂ y₂ x')
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁))
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (P₃ z y₁)
       (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x' ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
       (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x')
       (P₃ z y₁)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· (mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₂ x')
     (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
   · ((identity (P₁ x' w)
       #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x')
            (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)) #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
      · mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w)
          ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') (P₃ z y₁))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· (mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w ⊗ P₂ y₂ x')
     (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
   · (mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₂ x')
        ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
      · (identity (P₁ x' w)
         #⊗ (identity (P₂ y₂ x')
             #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                  (P₃ z y₁))
         · (identity (P₁ x' w)
            #⊗ mon_rassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (P₃ z y₁)
                 (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            · (identity (P₁ x' w)
               #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V
                    (P₂ y₂ x' ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
                    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
               · identity (P₁ x' w)
                 #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                      (P₂ y₂ x') (P₃ z y₁))))))

w: C₁

#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· ((identity (P₁ x' w)
    #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
   · mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w)

  (P₃ z y₁)
· (mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₂ x')
     ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
   · (identity (P₁ x' w)
      #⊗ (identity (P₂ y₂ x')
          #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
               (P₃ z y₁))
      · (identity (P₁ x' w)
         #⊗ mon_rassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (P₃ z y₁)
              (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         · (identity (P₁ x' w)
            #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x' ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
                 (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            · identity (P₁ x' w)

                   (P₂ y₂ x') (P₃ z y₁)))))

w: C₁

#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (P₁ x' w)

  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)

  #⊗ (identity (P₂ y₂ x')
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁))
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (P₃ z y₁)

w: C₁
x': C₂
mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (P₁ x' w)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w)
    ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') (P₃ z y₁) =
mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w)
    (P₂ y₂ x' ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)) (P₃ z y₁)
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       (P₃ z y₁)
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ (identity (P₂ y₂ x')
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁))
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (P₃ z y₁)

  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x' ⊗ P₃ z y₁)

· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x')

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· ((identity (P₁ x' w)
    #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
   · mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w)
       ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') (P₃ z y₁)) =
mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· (mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w)
     (P₂ y₂ x' ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)) (P₃ z y₁)
   · (identity (P₁ x' w)
      #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           (P₃ z y₁)
      · (identity (P₁ x' w)
         #⊗ (identity (P₂ y₂ x')
             #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                  (P₃ z y₁))
         · (identity (P₁ x' w)
            #⊗ mon_rassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (P₃ z y₁)
                 (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            · (identity (P₁ x' w)
               #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V

               · identity (P₁ x' w)
                 #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
(identity (P₁ x' w)
 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w)
    ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₂ y₂ x') (P₃ z y₁) =
mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₂ x' ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
  (P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (P₁ x' w)
   #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        (P₃ z y₁)
   · (identity (P₁ x' w)
      #⊗ (identity (P₂ y₂ x')
          #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
               (P₃ z y₁))
      · (identity (P₁ x' w)
         #⊗ mon_rassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (P₃ z y₁)
              (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         · (identity (P₁ x' w)
            #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x' ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
                 (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            · identity (P₁ x' w)
              #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                   (P₂ y₂ x') (P₃ z y₁)))))

P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄

y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₂ x' ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
  (P₃ z y₁)
· identity (P₁ x' w)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)) =
mon_lassociator (P₁ x' w) (P₂ y₂ x' ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
  (P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (P₁ x' w)
   #⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        (P₃ z y₁)
   · (identity (P₁ x' w)
      #⊗ (identity (P₂ y₂ x')
          #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
               (P₃ z y₁))
      · (identity (P₁ x' w)
         #⊗ mon_rassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (P₃ z y₁)
              (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         · (identity (P₁ x' w)
            #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x' ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
                 (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            · identity (P₁ x' w)

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
identity (P₁ x' w)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)) =
identity (P₁ x' w)
#⊗ mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (P₁ x' w)
   #⊗ (identity (P₂ y₂ x')
       #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁))
   · (identity (P₁ x' w)
      #⊗ mon_rassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (P₃ z y₁)
           (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · (identity (P₁ x' w)
         #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x' ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
              (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         · identity (P₁ x' w)
           #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                (P₂ y₂ x') (P₃ z y₁))))

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

identity (P₁ x' w)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)) =
identity (P₁ x' w)
#⊗ (mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      (P₃ z y₁)
    · (identity (P₂ y₂ x')
       #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
       · (mon_rassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (P₃ z y₁)
            (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
          · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x' ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
               (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
             · mon_rassociator (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                 (P₂ y₂ x') (P₃ z y₁)))))

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

w: C₁
x': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁) =
mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (P₂ y₂ x')
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
   · (mon_rassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (P₃ z y₁)
        (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x' ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
           (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         · mon_rassociator (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x')
             (P₃ z y₁))))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (P₂ y₂ x')
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
   · (mon_rassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (P₃ z y₁)
        (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x' ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
           (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         · mon_rassociator (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x')
             (P₃ z y₁)))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (P₂ y₂ x')
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
   · (mon_rassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (P₃ z y₁)
        (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x' ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
           (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         · mon_rassociator (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x')
             (P₃ z y₁)))) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (P₂ y₂ x')
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
   · (mon_rassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (P₃ z y₁)
        (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x' ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
           (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         · mon_rassociator (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x')
             (P₃ z y₁)))) = ?b

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
mon_rassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (P₃ z y₁) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x' ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
     (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · mon_rassociator (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x')
       (P₃ z y₁)) = ?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
mon_rassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (P₃ z y₁) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x' ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₂ y₂ x') (P₃ z y₁) =
?t2

      apply sym_mon_hexagon_rassociator.
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (P₂ y₂ x')
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
   · (identity (P₂ y₂ x')
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z y₁) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · mon_rassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
          (P₃ z y₁)
      · sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (P₂ y₂ x')
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
   · (identity (P₂ y₂ x')
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z y₁) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · mon_rassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
          (P₃ z y₁)
      · sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))) = ?b

z: C₄

w: C₁
x': C₂
?b =

#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (P₂ y₂ x')
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
   · (identity (P₂ y₂ x')
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z y₁) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · mon_rassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
          (P₃ z y₁)
      · sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁))) = ?b

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
identity (P₂ y₂ x')
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· (identity (P₂ y₂ x')
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z y₁) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · mon_rassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       (P₃ z y₁)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)) = ?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
identity (P₂ y₂ x')
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· identity (P₂ y₂ x')
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z y₁) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁) = ?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
identity (P₂ y₂ x')
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
    · sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ z y₁) (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
· mon_rassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁) = ?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
identity (P₂ y₂ x')
#⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
· mon_rassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁) = ?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
identity (P₂ y₂ x' ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁))
· mon_rassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁) = ?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
mon_rassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁) = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· (mon_rassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P₃ z y₁)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
mon_lassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_rassociator (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y₁, y₂: C₃
w: C₁
x': C₂
identity (P₂ y₂ x' ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P₃ z y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y₂ x') (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)

    apply id_left.
  Qed.

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
V
⟦ comp_enriched_profunctor
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w,
comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w ⟧

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
V
⟦ comp_enriched_profunctor
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w,
comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w ⟧

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
∏ y : C₃,
V ⟦ comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y w ⊗ P₃ z y,
comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w ⟧
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
∏ y₁ y₂ : C₃,
lmap_e (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) y₂ y₁ w
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁) · ?fs y₁ =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
  #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂ · ?fs y₂

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
∏ y : C₃,
V ⟦ comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y w ⊗ P₃ z y,
comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w ⟧
 exact (λ y,
             (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y w #⊗ identity _)
             · internal_eval _ _).
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
∏ y₁ y₂ : C₃,
lmap_e (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) y₂ y₁ w
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· (λ y : C₃,
   rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y w
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
   · internal_eval (P₃ z y)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w)) y₁ =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
  #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
· (λ y : C₃,
   rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y w
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
   · internal_eval (P₃ z y)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w)) y₂
 
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₃
(identity (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P₁ P₂ y₂ y₁ w
 · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     ((E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w)
 · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₁ w))
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₁ w
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
   · internal_eval (P₃ z y₁)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y₁)
· mon_lassociator
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
    (E₃ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P₃ z y₁)
· identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁ P₂ y₂ w)
  #⊗ rmap_e P₃ z y₁ y₂
· (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y₂ w
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z y₂)
   · internal_eval (P₃ z y₂)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w))

      exact (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_data_eq z y₁ y₂ w).
  Defined.

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
w: C₁
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w y
· rassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z w =
rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y w
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· internal_eval (P₃ z y)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w)

· rassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z w =

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

z: C₄
y: C₃
w: C₁
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w y
· from_comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w
    (λ y : C₃,
     rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y w
     #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
     · internal_eval (P₃ z y)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w))
    (λ y₁ y₂ : C₃,
     rassociator_enriched_profunctor_data_eq z y₁ y₂ w) =

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
y: C₃
w: C₁
rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y w
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· internal_eval (P₃ z y)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w) =
rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y w
#⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· internal_eval (P₃ z y)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w)

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧),
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x y
 · internal_transpose
     (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x)
      · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x w

       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w) =
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x y
 · internal_transpose
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w x)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w)

 · internal_transpose
     (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x)
      · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x w

w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x y #⊗ h
· internal_transpose
    (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x)
     · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x w
       #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
     · internal_eval (P₁ x w)

· internal_transpose
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w x)
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)

       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w)

y: C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z y) #⊗ h
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x y
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· internal_transpose
    (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x)
     · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x w
       #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
     · internal_eval (P₁ x w)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w)
     · rassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z w)
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w) =
identity (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z y) #⊗ h
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x y
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· internal_transpose
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w x)
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
identity (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z y) #⊗ h
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x y
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
   · (internal_transpose
        (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x)
         · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x w
            #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
            · (internal_eval (P₁ x w)
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                    P₃ z w)
               · rassociator_enriched_profunctor_data
                   z w))) #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
      · internal_eval (P₁ x w)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w))) =
identity (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z y) #⊗ h
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x y
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
   · (internal_transpose
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w x)
      #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
      · internal_eval (P₁ x w)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w)))

w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x y
#⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· (internal_transpose
     (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x)
      · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x w
         #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
         · (internal_eval (P₁ x w)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z
                 w)
            · rassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z w)))

   · internal_eval (P₁ x w)

          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w)) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x y
#⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· (internal_transpose
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w x)
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
   · internal_eval (P₁ x w)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w))

z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x y
#⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z x) (P₁ x w)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x)
         · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x w
            #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
            · (internal_eval (P₁ x w)
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                    P₃ z w)
               · rassociator_enriched_profunctor_data
                   z w)))) #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
   · internal_eval (P₁ x w)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w)) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x y
#⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z x) (P₁ x w)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w x)
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
   · internal_eval (P₁ x w)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₁
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w))

E₂: enrichment C₂ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x y
#⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z x) (P₁ x w)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x)
      · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x w
         #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
         · (internal_eval (P₁ x w)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z
                 w)
            · rassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z w)))) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x y
#⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z x) (P₁ x w)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w x)

comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x y
#⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z x) (P₁ x w)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)

· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x w
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)

       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w)
· rassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z w =

#⊗ identity (P₁ x w)

x: C₂
y: C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x y
#⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z x) (P₁ x w)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x w
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)

    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w)
· rassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z w = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category

x: C₂
y: C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
?b =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x y
#⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z x) (P₁ x w)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w x

    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z x) (P₁ x w)

x: C₂
y: C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x y
#⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z x) (P₁ x w)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x) = ?y'

x: C₂
y: C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x y
#⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z x) (P₁ x w)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x)) =

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category

z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x y
#⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· identity
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z x ⊗ P₁ x w) =
?y'

        apply id_right.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x y
#⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x w
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w)
· rassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z w =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x y
#⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z x) (P₁ x w)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w x

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V

P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x y
 · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x w)
#⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w)
· rassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z w =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x y
#⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z x) (P₁ x w)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w x

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y x w
· rassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z w =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x y
#⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ z x) (P₁ x w)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w x

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob z y x w
· rassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z w =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z y) (P₁ x w)
· identity (P₁ x w)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w x

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z y) (P₁ x w)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w y
· rassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z w =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z y) (P₁ x w)
· identity (P₁ x w)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w x

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z y) (P₁ x w)
· (mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z y)
   · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
      #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
      · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w y
         · rassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z w))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ y x ⊗ P₃ z y) (P₁ x w)
· (identity (P₁ x w)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x y
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w x)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z y)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
   · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w y
      · rassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z w)) =
identity (P₁ x w)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w x

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧
mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (P₂ y x) (P₃ z y)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ y w x
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z y)
   · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w y
      · rassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z w)) =
?b

#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z x y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁

· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z w =

x: C₃

   #⊗ identity (P₃ z x)

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₃
y: C₂
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, P₃ z x ⟧),
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x w y
 · internal_lam
     (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x w
      #⊗ identity (P₃ z x)
      · internal_eval (P₃ z x)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁

      · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z w))
#⊗ h
· internal_eval (P₃ z x)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w) =
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x w y
 · internal_lam
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_in
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w x))
#⊗ h
· internal_eval (P₃ z x)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w)

y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z x ⟧
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x w y
 · internal_lam
     (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x w
      #⊗ identity (P₃ z x)
      · internal_eval (P₃ z x)

h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z x ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x w y #⊗ h
· internal_lam

     #⊗ identity (P₃ z x)
     · internal_eval (P₃ z x)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₃
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z x ⟧
identity (P₁ y w ⊗ P₂ x y) #⊗ h
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x w y
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x)
· internal_lam
    (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x w
     #⊗ identity (P₃ z x)
     · internal_eval (P₃ z x)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w)
     · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z w)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x)
· internal_eval (P₃ z x)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w) =
identity (P₁ y w ⊗ P₂ x y) #⊗ h
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x w y
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x)
· internal_lam
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_in
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w x)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ z x)
· internal_eval (P₃ z x)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w)

· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x w y
   #⊗ identity (P₃ z x)
   · (internal_lam
        (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z x w
         #⊗ identity (P₃ z x)
         · (internal_eval (P₃ z x)

   · (internal_lam

      #⊗ identity (P₃ z x)
      · internal_eval (P₃ z x)

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z x ⟧
mon_lassociator (P₁ y w) (P₂ x y) (P₃ z x)
· identity (P₁ y w)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z y x
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w y

· (identity (P₁ y w)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z y x
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ y w)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z y)

h: V ⟦ a, P₃ z x ⟧
identity (P₁ y w)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ z y x
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ y w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ z y)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z y w
  #⊗ identity (P₁ y w)
· internal_eval (P₁ y w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w) = 
?t2

V: benabou_cosmos

E₁: enrichment C₁ V

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄

w: C₁
V
⟦ comp_enriched_profunctor
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ z w,
comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) z w ⟧
 exact (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z w).
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
is_inverse_in_precat
  (lassociator_enriched_profunctor z w)
  (rassociator_enriched_profunctor_data z w)
 exact (is_inverse_lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor z w).
  Defined.

  Definition rassociator_enriched_profunctor
    : enriched_profunctor_transformation
        (comp_enriched_profunctor
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
           P₃)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor
           P₁
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃))
    := inv_enriched_profunctor_transformation
         _
         is_iso_lassociator_enriched_profunctor.

  
V: benabou_cosmos

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
enriched_profunctor_square (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
  (functor_id_enrichment E₄)
  (comp_enriched_profunctor
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃)
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
enriched_profunctor_square (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
  (functor_id_enrichment E₄)
  (comp_enriched_profunctor
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃)
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
enriched_profunctor_transformation
  (comp_enriched_profunctor
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃)
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃))

    exact rassociator_enriched_profunctor.
  Defined.
End Associator.
